faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: What is the scope of healthcare management in India?
faqs.answer:
In India, Healthcare/Hospital Sector is in growing face because due to higher no. of population and area we need lot of hospital and best in practice and services. There are lot of institute which provides course in different fields related to Healthcare & Hospital sector. IIHMR Bangalore, for Maharashtra you can look for SGRR Group of Institutions Dehradun.

individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has a drug research institute, 3 canteens, and good food.

content.Placements: After completing the course, most of the medical students do their practice in their own clinic. They can also prepare for MD and medical officers. There are several exams they can apply for. After the bachelor's, we can apply for MD in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is not huge as it is a decent campus. Classrooms are good with an air-conditioned facility. The library is good, and it has most of the books. The hostel facility is bad, and it does not have many seats for students. Many students live in the outside hostel. There are so many labs where you can apply your knowledge practically.

individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities but little more has to be improved.

content.Placements: 95% of students passed with good marks, the lowest 10k to max 70k package offered, Germany Homeopathic, 100% student got intern in any gov. Hospital, BHMS PG, MO. There are OPDs also available within in the campus which have more no. of patients and also emergency ward is instructed.
content.Infrastructure: All available in very good situation, as in boys hostel I stay. It was great in meal because we boys are maintaining. There are mess which is under maintenance of one of the students duty which is very fair and good. Sports ground is not so much but there is volleyball which is famous in this college.

individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college under Uttar Pradesh Government with good OPD and classrooms.

content.Placements: BHMS stands for Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery. It is an undergraduate program in the field of homoeopathy. The course is for 5 years which includes a one-year internship. After this, we can start our practice or get jobs in private or government sectors as medical officers, professors, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is up to the mark. Classrooms and labs are well-furnished. Hostels accommodation is not satisfactory. Wi-Fi is available in the hostels. Quality of mess food is also good. Sports meet is held every year where there is much crowd and exposure.

individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: If anyone wants to become a homeopathic doctor, then NHMC Lucknow is the best place to land in.

content.Placements: BHMS in Lucknow, NHMC, is totally different from other government homeopathic colleges in Uttar Pradesh in terms of having better faculty members and MD homo seniors. They really help us engage more in studies and practice while in classroom, hostel or OPD. Patient intake in OPD is also up to the mark. In my opinion, NHMC is the best college in Uttar Pradesh.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is eco-friendly and well-equipped with all the facilities required like mess, gym, library, Wi-Fi, discussion room, hall, and an auditorium to conduct extracurricular activities. 24-hour light and Ro water facilities are available. Vehicles are available for all hostel students in case of emergency.

According to Round 3 National Homeopathic Medical College and Hospital AYUSH NEET UG cutoff 2024, for the AI quota, closing rank for General category students was 84092. faqs.question: What is the career scope after DPharm from OPJS University?

faqs.answer: A:    There are various job opportunities for candidates with a BSc degree. OPJS University BSc graduates should maintain a good portfolio or profile. The graudates can also opt for higher studies. faqs.question: What are the career prospects after completing B.Sc from OPJS University?

review_content.Other: Known for its beautiful infrastructure and quality educational services, OPJS University has started gaining appreciation from students, reviewers and other educational institutions. OPJS University has a widespread campus of 32 acres near Arvali Hills comprising of the main building, libraries, laboratories, hostels and residences for teachers and students. The design of the building is constructed in such a way that it consumes less energy and save more of it. There are ample facilities provided to the students of OPJS University such as transport, research, residencies, Wi-Fi inability, a big updated library etc. Each classroom has the capacity to accommodate 150 students and modern education facilities to ensure efficient learning. OPJS University was built in 2013 under the Act 16 of 2013 in the city of Churu in Rajasthan. The city is well connected to all the important cities of the state. The promulgation event of OPJS University was carried out in the presence of the honorable governor of the state. Students can apply for any of the educational programs for the wide variety of programs provided by the OPJS University in different streams. There are a number of undergraduate programs, special diploma programs, postgraduate programs and PhD programs available. Under the category of School of Education and Physical Education, it offers courses as follow- 1. M.A. 2. B.Ed./B.A./B.Sc.B.Ed. 3. B.P.Ed. 4. D.P.Ed. 5. B.EI.Ed. 6. D.EI.Ed. 7. B.P.E. 8. M.P.E. 9. D.P.S.E. Diploma in Preschool Education (D.P.S.E.) is available in OPJS University as a full time course of 2 years comprising of 4 semesters. The minimum eligibility required for D.P.S.E. is an HSC. The prescribed fees for D.P.S.E per year are Rs.25, 000 only. The students will have to pay Rs.1000 as exam fees for every semester.

paragraphs: OPJS University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university conducts entrance exams for admission to courses such as PhD, MPhil, B.Ed and law courses. Selection for all other programmes is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.OPJS Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Management, Commerce, Engineering, etc. through 12 schools. Interested candidates can apply online for their preferred course.
OPJS University admissions are currently open. Candidates can apply for UG, PG or doctoral courses in regular mode. Below are the key admission highlights for OPJS:

OPJS University admissions are primarily based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. For some of the courses, the selection is based on university-level entrance exam. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility and selection criteria for topOPJS University courses:

OPJS University fee breakup includes multiple components such as tuition fee, registration, exam, etc. Students are required to pay tuition fee semester-wise or annually. Candidates are required to pay course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat. Below is theOPJS University feefor popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

OPJS University offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university opens applications online on the official website of the university. Below is the step-wiseOPJS University admission process:
STEP 1: OPJS University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online for all courses. Candidates need to fill out the application form along with the specified documents. Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria also need to pay a non-refundable application fee.
STEP 2: Selection

OPJS University selects candidates for admission based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam i.e. Class 12 for UG and graduation for PG courses. The university conducts an entrance exam for B.Ed, MPhil, PhD and law courses. OPJS accepts CUET score for admission to most of the UG courses.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection process is over and the entrance exam results are out, the university releases a merit list. The university might call the aspirants for document verification. Selected candidates need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at OPJS University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete graduation to apply for OPJS University MBA programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, the selection for MBA is done based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Once the selection process is over, the university releases a merit list. The university might call the aspirants for document verification.

faqs.question: How costly is OPJS University?
faqs.answer: OPJS University fee varies course-wise. The tuition fee for all the UG, PG courses of OPJS University ranges betweenINR 9,500 to INR 4.90 lakhs. The university also offers relaxation in fee to certain category of students. Below is OPJS University fee for popular courses:Course NameOne-Time FeeTuition FeeBTechINR 1,200INR 1.12 Lacs - INR 4 lakhMTechINR 1,200INR 1.20 lakhMBAINR 1,200INR 50,000 - INR 2 lakhBScNAINR 60,000 - INR 1.50 lakhMScNAINR 36,000 - INR 50,000Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I get into OPJS University with 70% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: OPJS University eligibility criteria depends on the course applied by the candidates. However, the basic eligibility remains the same. For UG courses, it is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The university has not specified the minimum aggregate for most of the courses. However, candidates with 70% aggregate can easily apply for any of the UG or PG courses.

faqs.question: Can I join OPJS University directly?
faqs.answer: OPJS University offers admission to UG, PG and doctoral courses either based on merit or entrance exam score. The university selects candidates for admission based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam i.e. Class 12 for UG and graduation for PG courses. The university conducts an entrance exam for B.Ed, MPhil, PhD and law courses. OPJS accepts CUET score for admission to most of the UG courses.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by OPJS University for admission?
faqs.answer: OPJS University accepts national-level entrance exam for some of the courses while admission to some other courses such as B.Ed, MPhil, PhD and law courses are based on entrance exam conducted by the university. OPJS acceptsCUET-UGscore for admission to most of the UG courses.Common University Entrance Testalso known asCUET UGis a national level entrance exam conducted in multiple phases depending upon on the number of candidates registered for the entrance exam.

college_info.intro:
MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research (MIT BIO) offers a variety of courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, and PhD for bioengineering. MIT BIO popular programmes include BE/BTech, ME/MTech, among others. B.Tech in Bioengineering is offered for Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, Biomaterials, and Biomedical Engineering branches.
Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, Biomaterials, and Biomedical Engineering are some branches offered for Integrated MTech. MTech is also offered in Environmental Bioengineering.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research (MIT BIO) offers 5 courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels in the stream of Engineering. These courses are further offered across various specialisations, namely Biomaterial Engineering, Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, Industrial Bioengineering, and Industrial Biotechnology, among others. Admission to all courses is based on merit and entrance exams for some courses. The duration of courses at MIT BIO ranges from 2-5 years.

faqs.answer: A:    MIT BIO offers BTech across various specialisations that include, Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, Biomaterial and Biomedical engineering. The tuition fee for BTech at MIT BIO is INR 9.43 L. This is exclusive of other academic expenses such as examination fee, laboratory fee, hostel charges, mess charges, etc. The fee structure is subject to change, and the interested candidates must check the official website of MIT BIO for more details.
faqs.question: How much does BTech cost in MIT BIO?

faqs.answer: A:    MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences & Research fee is a cumulative of caution deposit, tuition fee, exam fee, etc. Aspirants need to pay course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat. Below is course-wise fee for MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences & Research:CourseTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 9.4 lakh - INR 12 lakhMTechINR 2 lakh - INR 12 lakhMScINR 1.9 lakh - INR 3 lakhPhDINR 5.3 lakh

faqs.answer: A:    MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research offers MSc in Industrial Biotechnology. The discipline of industrial biotechnology involves an investigation and utilisation of industrially and commercially beneficial microorganisms. The eligibility criteria for MSc at MIT BIO is Bachelor's Degree in Life Sciences (Biotechnology /Microbiology/Botany / Zoology / Food Science / Nutrition / Agricultural Sciences) BE or BTech (Chemical/ Biotechnology/ Biomedical) from a recognised University, with a minimum of 50 % aggregate marks or equivalent.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Bioengineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Great infrastructure, highly skilled faculty, well-equipped labs, unique curriculum design.

review_content.Placements: I am a pass-out student from the batch 2021 and was enrolled in the Bachelor of Technology in Bioengineering. The class strength was about 50 out of which 35 students were from B.Tech and the rest from M.Tech. Almost 80-85% of students were placed with an average package of around 3 LPA. The top Recruiting company for the course was Tata Elxsi, Citius Tech, Sunpharma and NASAN biomedical. The roles offered are Software Engineer in Clinical Informatics, Medical Coder, Regulatory affairs executive and Data Annotation executive.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Bioengineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Multidisciplinary coursework that prepares for an advance career in Bioengineering related fields.

review_content.Placements: It is rising reputable institution with a promising placement rate. Major recruiters are Capgemini, Tata Elxsi, Sun Pharma along with several other biotech, biopharma, medical instrumentation and bioinformatics companies. There is a Placement Cell that assits students in finding internships and jobs while also preparing for them through placement training such as aptitude tests.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs' infrastructure is sophisticated and continuously updating. With research-oriented laboratories, the institute offers a diverse range of tools and infrastructure for students to explore the various sectors of Bioengineering. There is a central library with an extensive collection of literature in varied disciplines and a reading room where students can study after college hours. The university provides multiple mess services and the hostels are equipped with all essential living amenities, including housekeeping and laundry services. The sports complex offers a number of indoor and outdoor activities as well as a gym with trained coaches. There are inter-intra tournaments taking place frequently. Every hostel has a first aid kit and in an event of an emergency, the Vishwanath hospital is called for an ambulance and the student is accompanied by a hostel warden.

faqs.answer: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC). MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research is a constituent of MIT-ADT University, which is a private university located in Loni Kalbhor, Pune, Maharashtra.

review_summary.college_name: MIT BIO Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Industrial Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best college ever to enjoy college life.

content.Placements: Last year around 80% of placement took place. Around 6LPA was the highest package offered. There are lots of companies that recruit freshers. Students can get the placement based on their academic achievements, projects, and CGPA. Roles offered by companies are in quality control, research, and development, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good and fascinating infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi on each and every floor and can be accessible to every student. The labs are pretty good and provided with a variety of equipment. The college provides smart classrooms with projectors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Bioengineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities along with good placements.

content.Placements: Nearly 65+ percent students get placed but most of the academically smart ones go for Masters. The college also gives offer letters for reputed Universities whether in India or abroad. Average package offered is between 5-10 lacs and the highest package goes up to 30 lacs. More than 85% students get internships in reputed companies such as Serum Institute, etc.
content.Infrastructure: MIT School of Bioengineering has a building with great infrastructure which contains spacious classrooms, dry and wet labs, 3 auditoriums, study rooms, etc. The University also provides hostel facilities (both inside the campus and off-campus). They have two main mess which serve good quality of food having a balanced diet. The University has a big sports complex having indoor and outdoor games including a swimming pool and a gym.

admission_overview.title: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences admission is primarily entrance-based. The school accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as NEET, MHT CET, etc. for admission to specific courses. A constituent university of MIT ADT University, the school also considers PERA CET score for admission to various courses. MIT School of Engineering offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

eligibility_selection.title: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: The school offers six full-time courses in the Bioengineering field. Candidates need to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below are MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

faqs.answer: Candidates who have complete a two-years master's or a MPhil degree with a minimum of 60% aggregate or equivalent are eligible to apply for MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences PhD programme. Applicants with MTech/ BTech/ ME/ MS qualification in relevant disciplines with a minimum CGPA of 6.0 on a 10 point scale or equivalent or 60% marks and with 60% aggregate in Class 10, Class 12 and BTech/ BE is also considered eligible.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for PhD at MIT School of Bio-Engineering Sciences?

faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed Class 12 or equivalent in Science stream with Mathematics/ Biology with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) are eligible to apply for MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences BTech course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at MIT School of Bio-Engineering Sciences?

faqs.answer: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research offers admission to its PhD programme based on merit in entrance scores. An in-house exam is conducted called PET of MIT-ADT University. However, scores of GATE/NET shall also be accepted. Shortlisted candidates can further also be called for the interview round.
faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research PhD?

faqs.answer: Candidates with a relevant PG degree in the Bioengineering stream with required aggregate can apply. The aspirants with a 2-year master's or MPhil/ME/MS/MBBS/BDS or other relevant degree passed with a minimum of 60% aggregate can apply. During form filling and admission, the aspirants must hold the relevant documents. These are required for verification purposes.

admission_process.title: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences offers admission to courses based on entrance exam scores. The institute opens registration via online mode for all courses. Below are the steps to get a seat in MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences:
STEP 1: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates need to register and fill out the application form. Aspirants need to pay a non-refundable application fee of INR 1,500 to register for a course or PERA CET.
STEP 2: Selection

The school shortlists candidates for BTech and Integrated MTech based on NEET, JEE Main or MHT CET. For MTech, the selection is based on GATE or PERA. MIT-ADT University conducts PET for admission to PhD courses. Besides, admission to MSc is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Selected students may further need to come for the GD/ PI round.
STEP 3: Merit List and Admission Confirmation

The school releases a merit list based on the entrance exam or qualifying exam score of the candidates. Selected aspirants are called for document verification and fee payment for final admission. Selected candidates need to payMIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research feeto confirm their seat.

courses_data.description: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences offers four-year full-time BTech in Bioengineering. The course is spread across eight semesters. Aspirants need to complete Class 12 in the Science stream with Mathematics/ Biology with at least 50% aggregate to apply for BTech. There is a 5% relaxation in the aggregate for the reserved category. The selection for BTech programme is based on NEET, JEE (Paper-I) or CET score.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research BTech ranges betweenINR 9.4 lakh and INR 12 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. In case student wishes to withdraw from the programme or cancel the admission, are offered refund as per the institute policy.

Besides, candidates must also fulfil the eligibility requirements for admission. The school releases a merit list based on entrance exam score of the candidates. Selected aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: Does MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research offer MTech?
faqs.answer: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research offers two-year M.Tech in Environmental Engineering course divided into four semesters. Aspirants with at least 50% aggregate in bachelor's degree can apply for M.Tech course. Besides, the selection for M.Tech is based on entrance exam score.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for M.Tech at MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed a bachelor's degree in BE/ BTech Environmental Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/ Ceramic Technology/ Mechanical / Metallurgy /Civil Engineering /Mining Engineering/ Biochemical Engineering /Biotechnology /Instrumentation Engineering with at least 50% aggregate or equivalent CGPA can apply for MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research M.Tech programme.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for M.Tech at MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research?
faqs.answer: There are a total of 30 seats in M.Tech course of MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research. Candidates are offered seat in the M.Tech programme based on GATE or PERA. faqs.answer: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences offers a two-year MSc programme spread across four semesters. The school offers MSc at the PG level. Below are the MSc specialisations offered by the school:Industrial BiotechnologyBioinformatics

faqs.question: How many marks are required for MSc at MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to hold a minimum of 50% aggregate in BSc degree in Life Sciences / Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Chemistry or other allied Science to apply for MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research MSc Industry Biotechnology programme. Aspirants must pass BSc in any field of Life Sciences / Agricultural Sciences / Bioinformatics with a minimum of 60% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST candidates) to apply for MSc Bioinformatics.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for MSc at MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research?

faqs.question: Are admissions open at MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research?
faqs.answer: Yes, MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research admissions are currently open. Interested candidates can register online for the preferred course. Aspirants need to meet the eligibility criteria to apply for a programme. Admission to most of the UG and PG courses is entrance-based. Hence, candidates must ensure to qualify the entrance exam accepted for their programme to get admission.

faqs.question: Can I join MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences & Research directly?
faqs.answer: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences does not offer direct admission. Candidates can join the school by qualifying the accepted entrance exam. The school considers NEET, JEE Main (Paper-I), MHT CET for admission to BTech and Integrated MTech programme. Aspirants are offered seat in MTech based on GATE or PERA. Besides, the selection for MSc is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Are admissions at MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences & Research offers admission to most of the UG and PG courses is based on entrance-exam score. The school accepts NEET, JEE (Paper-I), GATE, etc. for admission to specific courses. MIT-ADT University also conducts PERA for selection to MTech courses. For MSc, the school considers the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Admission to PhD programme is based on PET conducted by MIT-ADT University or GATE or NET score.

faqs.question: How to get admission at MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research for PhD?
faqs.answer: For selection in PhD course, candidates must meet eligibility requirements and have a valid score of the accepted examination. Aspirants with a valid PG degree passed with at least60% aggregatecan apply. Eligible candidates can visit the official website to register and apply. The selection is further done based onGATE/NET/PET of MIT-ADT Universityscores and interview round. Selected candidates can further pay the admission fee amount to secure their seats.

placement_data.title: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to the official data available, the highest package offered during MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research placements in recent past for BTech Bioengineering program stood at INR 9 LPA.

MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research placement cell remains active throughout the academic year . The cell acts as a bridge between the industry and students. Students of MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research have the opportunity to find placement through Pre-placement o?ers, On-Campus placement and Off-Campus hiring . The strong industry network helps students to work on LIVE industry project from the third year of their study. In recent past, companies have extended Pre-placement offers to students as well.

Internships form the integral part of the course curriculum and are mandatory for the students. Students are required to undergo internships during the summer breaks from third year onwards . Further, BTech and Integrated MTech students need to complete a 6-month semester end project to successfully complete their course credit. The School also has a strong alumni network that allows the current students to get the necessary guidance and mentorship.

hostel_campus.college_name: MIT BIO Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The Institute is fully residential and hostel accommodation is provided to the students. Hostel provides accommodation with compulsory food facility to students from various faculties as well as institutions. The food hotel mess is common for both boys and girls and is located at river front in-campus. Visiting guest for admission purpose as well as parents willing to meet students can book guest houses on request basis based on prior booking through website. Internet connectivity and Solar water heating systems are provided in the hostels.

library.description: Central Library has room for over 200 students, open access study places and IT work stations. There are over 1000 books on Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, Biomedical and Bioengineering in the MIT Bioengineering library. There are national and international books, journals, magazines and periodicals.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Biotechnology Lab, Material Science Lab, Bioinformatics Lab, Molecular Modelling & Simulations Lab, Bio Safety Level II Lab, Genomics Lab, Tissue Engineering Lab, Molecular Biology Lab, Biomechanical and Imaging Lab, Nanobiotechnology Lab, Microbiology Lab, Microcontroller Lab, Environmental Lab, Biosensors and System Lab, Biomedical Instrumentation Lab

reviews.review_heading: The best college ever to enjoy college life.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good and fascinating infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi on each and every floor and can be accessible to every student. The labs are pretty good and provided with a variety of equipment. The college provides smart classrooms with projectors.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities along with good placements.
reviews.review_text: MIT School of Bioengineering has a building with great infrastructure which contains spacious classrooms, dry and wet labs, 3 auditoriums, study rooms, etc. The University also provides hostel facilities (both inside the campus and off-campus). They have two main mess which serve good quality of food having a balanced diet. The University has a big sports complex having indoor and outdoor games including a swimming pool and a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, highly skilled faculty, well-equipped labs, unique curriculum design.
reviews.review_text: MIT School of Bioengineering Sciences and Research has good quality and well-equipped labs for each department. All the instruments and products used in the labs are of high quality and required safety standards are always followed in the labs to ensure students' safety. Classrooms are air-conditioned and have good seating arrangements with an option to set up a projector for teaching purposes. W-Fi facility available 24x7 in the hostels. Good quality meals (including salads and desserts) are av...

reviews.review_heading: Multidisciplinary coursework that prepares for an advance career in Bioengineering related fields.
reviews.review_text: The labs' infrastructure is sophisticated and continuously updating. With research-oriented laboratories, the institute offers a diverse range of tools and infrastructure for students to explore the various sectors of Bioengineering. There is a central library with an extensive collection of literature in varied disciplines and a reading room where students can study after college hours. The university provides multiple mess services and the hostels are equipped with all essential living ameniti...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good with excellent placement support.
reviews.review_text: The library has a wide variety of resources. Our college provides multiple labs for electrical engineering, tissue engineering, microbiology, biochemistry, and bioinformatics courses. The food served in the mess is delicious.

reviews.review_heading: It has perfect amalgamation of research and industry-oriented curriculum for our bright future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. One can be connected to nature and pursue his education well as it has a lavish green campus of 1245 acres, with all the amenities. The college infrastructure is up-to-date with cutting-edge technologies and research equipment aiding students to pursue their interests and implement without any infrastructure blockade.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for those looking into research careers.
reviews.review_text: The education facilities in our college are good, and the equipment is all up-to-date. The quality of the food served in the mess is decent, and there are dedicated resources for sports and other hobbies. There are qualified instructors for rowing, swimming, badminton, football, table tennis, and lawn tennis. Medical facilities are also provided immediately in case of injury or illness. Hostels are quite comfortable, although some of them are outside the campus. Most classrooms are spacious, wit...

reviews.review_heading: Absolute fun learning here with ample opportunities for shaping your career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of MIT-ADT is really awesome concerning the fee paid. There are excellent sports facilities with an all-inclusive sports complex, multiple auditoriums, libraries, and lawns, etc., and all these facilities are excellent here. We have decent laboratories, classrooms, yoga hall, and computer labs, etc. Our canteens are average, but the campus is beautiful. Hostel facilities are excellent. It is pretty safe for girls as well.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to make a career in research, you should join here.
reviews.review_text: Our college has two buildings and multiple labs like tissue engineering lab, nano-technology, microbiology, molecular biology, BSL-2, biomedical instrumentation, bioinformatics, etc. There are additional computer labs, and all labs are air-conditioned and equipped with Wi-Fi facilities. There are an in-house library and multiple other libraries on the campus. There is a huge sports arena with badminton, swimming pool, cricket, tennis and many other sports. Our college provides free coaching, and...

reviews.review_heading: It has well-qualified teachers and good facilities, and it is a worthy college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. We have well-maintained labs for each subject with many tools like many microscopes, etc. We don't have classrooms of ours to sit, so we go to Soer to attend lectures. Practicals are held at our own building. Hostel rooms are good, but the mess is not that good. Facilities available are Wi-Fi and labs, and we have medical facilities.

data.description: MIT BIO Campus was formerly owned by the Late. Shri. Raj Kapoor's family. It is popularly known as the Raj Baugh Campus and is spread over 125 acres of lush greenery on the beautiful banks of the Mula-Mutha river. MIT BIO campus offers stat-of-art infrastructure and is well-equipped with facilities like Hostel, Central Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi, Cafeteria, Transportation, Laboratories, AC Classrooms, Medical facilities, Auditorium, Music and Dance rooms, etc.

Karunya University popular programmes are MBA, BTech, & MSc. The Karunya University MBA students are placed in top organisations like Wipro, Amazon, EY, KPMG, & others. The MBA students can use the facilities available at central library which is well equipped with modern facilities & various resources in the form of CD-ROM, On-line databases, e-journals, e-books, audio video cassettes, books, journals, project reports etc. Karunya University has experienced faculty members who are PhD, diploma, & degree holders. Through the popular programmes, the university tries to bridge the gap btw the theory & practice through industrial visits, internships, projects, & immersion programmes that provides the students with a firsthand experience of the corporate world.

review_summary.college_name: Karunya University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Karunya Institute of Technology .

content.Placements: There were lot of companies which came for placement. Few of them are Zifo, Amazon, Infosys, Capegemini, Cognizant, TCS, and TNQ technologies. I personally got placed in TNQ Technologies and worked for a year there. While working in TNQ Technologies, my interest towards clinical research propelled more, and now I'm working in a Pharma company. More than half my batch mates got placed.
content.Infrastructure: The curriculum aligns with current industry requirements and academic trends. Courses like biopharmaceutical technology, genetics, and clinical database is what had my interest when I joined my UG. The curriculum forces you to think outside the classroom and equips you well when you step outside for job. Hostel was my home away from home. The beauty of the campus and hostel heals you. Food also you can choose among north, south, or continental. I don;t think any other college has this great residential accommodation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of the faculty, good placements in 2024, and the infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Nearly 80% of students are placed in our courses. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest package is 4 LPA, and the average package is 8.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Amazon, Cognizant, Hexaware, Deltax, etc. 50% of students got internships in our course through respective interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided in our college include Wi-Fi, classrooms, a library, a canteen, a CAD lab, and a bookshop. The facilities in our hostel include Wi-Fi, CCTV, and food. The food in the canteen is nice, with reasonable prices and good quality. Medical facilities are also available on our college campus. In the hostel, we have different messes according to the regions from where students come, such as Andhra mess, Kerala mess, North mess, etc.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Had a great experience in college.

content.Placements: Highest salary package offered is 13 LPA, and lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Almost 75% of students got placed. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, TCS, and Microsoft. Around 65% of students got an internship. Top recruiting companies are web-developed and software-developed.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available 24 hours with high-speed internet at the college. Classrooms are good and neat. Labs have good equipment. Library has all the books. Hostel facilities are available at the college. Mess in the canteen. Medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology (Genome Engineering and Technology) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent infrastructure, moderately good placements, scope for exposure, and ranks 29th in India.

content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students got placed from my course. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest starts from 2.5 LPA. Recruiters included Johnson & Johnson, Biocon, Syngene, and others. Roles offered are assistant researcher/analyst/QA, and WC department roles.
content.Infrastructure: Biotechnology department has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and classrooms are well-lit and sufficient to accommodate atleast 80 students at a time. We have a central library as well. Mess food is average. Canteen food is better. Medical facilities like Seesha Hospital are active 24X7, and wide range of sports are conducted like volleyball or throwball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Karunya University review.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placements for the students. At the beginning of the final year, the college provides placement training to prepare the students for placements. Most of the students have been placed in companies that provide placement packages of around 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: College has really great infrastructure, and the labs in the biotechnology department are well-equipped. The college is situated near a beautiful valley, which provides a good climate. The hostels are separate for each year, thus reducing the chances of ragging.

placement_report.college_name: Karunya University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package & Top Companies

placement_data.title: Karunya University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Karunya University has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. 375 recruiters visited the vampus and presented over 1900 jobs to the batch 2025. A total of 1478 students of the batch 2025 secured atleast one offer and 422 secured multiple offers from reputed companies. The highest package offered during Karunya University placemehts 2025 stood at INR 23.6 LPA. The students of the CSE batch secured this package. The highest salary secured by the MBA batch 2025 stood at INR 9.5 LPA. 82.5% of the MBA students secured jobs during the drive 2025. Some of the top recruiters of Karunya Institute of Technology and Sciences in 2025 include Google, Infosys, TCS , Amazon, Accenture , Deloitte, IBM, Wipro, etc.

highlights.description: Karunya University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #151-200 in the Overall category, #101-150 under University, and #101-150 under Engineering by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Karunya University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 19th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
25th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
13th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Karunya University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the Karunya University's rankings in 'Overall' category have demonstrated stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Karunya University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Karunya University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The 'Engineering' category rankings of the institute have shown a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Karunya University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Karunya University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Karunya University fell 13 ranks to #694 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Karunya University's rank is #212, the same as last year's rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

hostel_campus.college_name: Karunya University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The University provides 15 Separate hostels for Boys and Girls With Single seater room, Double seater room and Four seater room with 16 spacious and separate dining halls, Internet facility, Reading room, Gym, ATM facility, Sports facility and many more.

library.description:
The Central library opens from 8.00 AM to 11.00 PM on weekdays, 8.00 AM to 5.30 PM on Saturday and closed on Sunday. It is well equipped with 1,20,654 books, modern facilities, and resources in the form of CD-ROM, on-line databases, e-journals, e-books, audio video cassettes, books, journals, project reports. Apart from this, every department has its own department library.
These are the following e-resources: Science direct- 883, Springer-586, EBSC0-800, Emerald- 101,  IEEE-ASPP161, Scopus more than 10,000 abstracts, Springer e-books-932 and Proquest ebooks - 143548.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Karunya Institute of Technology .
reviews.review_text: The curriculum aligns with current industry requirements and academic trends. Courses like biopharmaceutical technology, genetics, and clinical database is what had my interest when I joined my UG. The curriculum forces you to think outside the classroom and equips you well when you step outside for job. Hostel was my home away from home. The beauty of the campus and hostel heals you. Food also you can choose among north, south, or continental. I don;t think any other college has this great resi...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty, good placements in 2024, and the infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in our college include Wi-Fi, classrooms, a library, a canteen, a CAD lab, and a bookshop. The facilities in our hostel include Wi-Fi, CCTV, and food. The food in the canteen is nice, with reasonable prices and good quality. Medical facilities are also available on our college campus. In the hostel, we have different messes according to the regions from where students come, such as Andhra mess, Kerala mess, North mess, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Had a great experience in college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available 24 hours with high-speed internet at the college. Classrooms are good and neat. Labs have good equipment. Library has all the books. Hostel facilities are available at the college. Mess in the canteen. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure, moderately good placements, scope for exposure, and ranks 29th in India.
reviews.review_text: Biotechnology department has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and classrooms are well-lit and sufficient to accommodate atleast 80 students at a time. We have a central library as well. Mess food is average. Canteen food is better. Medical facilities like Seesha Hospital are active 24X7, and wide range of sports are conducted like volleyball or throwball.

reviews.review_heading: Karunya University review.
reviews.review_text: College has really great infrastructure, and the labs in the biotechnology department are well-equipped. The college is situated near a beautiful valley, which provides a good climate. The hostels are separate for each year, thus reducing the chances of ragging.

reviews.review_heading: A peaceful life in college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in hostel and in college are very good. College facilities are upgraded to highest facility, and hostel facilities are very clean and safe. You can get everything in the hostel. Labs are all very tech, and the hospital is nearby for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college was nice and has a good environment. The infrastructure was good. Classrooms are neat. The labs are well-equipped with air conditioning. The Wi-Fi facility is available. The books are available in the library. The campus provides a hotel facility for both boys and girls. The canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: A new life with Karunya University.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in the department, which are essential for the course. The department itself also has a library. The whole campus has an internet connection provided by the university. Smart boards are available, which help in conducting presentations, and seminar halls are available for hosting seminars.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Karunya School of Management, Karunya Institute of Technology and SciencesReviewed on 8 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: In my college, a scholarship is provided in accordance with government rules.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, but there are some downsides, like Wi-Fi with poor internet service. There are also classrooms, but it is not furnished. But they provide a library, where we can get books on the subject. Hotel facilities are not very good. The mess has been cleaned up, but the quality of the food is so bad that we can't eat it. Sports and cultural events are held.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Karunya School of Management, Karunya Institute of Technology and SciencesReviewed on 27 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best university for the MBA course.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts a top-notch campus with all the amenities, including digital textbooks, a library, and high-speed internet in classes. We have numerous sports fields and a hospital for medical services. Both the hostels and the canteen food are excellent and delicious. Additionally, hostel rooms are completely secured.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Karunya.
reviews.review_text: The course is good. The facility is nice. The campus is good. Hostel is good. Infrastructure, food, safety, gym facilities, neat washrooms, xerox shops, cafes, supermarket, and all available inside the compound including the salon. So there is no need to go outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Karunya University is a well-structured campus with holistic development opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The course curriculum is well-structured and has real-world applications. The infrastructure includes well-facilitated labs to conduct projects and modern teaching techniques. Facilities provided on campus are great, with various options in each sector.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with good teachers, good building, and the safety they provide.
reviews.review_text: Here hostel is well-cleaned and neat with a caretaker to take care of the students inside the hostel campus has many stores from a beauty parlor to a supermarket, many food courts, a tailoring shop beauty store, etc. This makes students not go outside the hostel campus, there is a playground in hostel campus and a hospital of the institution. Classrooms are digitalized with projectors and Wi-Fi connection, and all the labs and libraries are infrastructure with AC.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure is there. We have Wi-Fi facility for students and staffs. Classes, labs, and library are excellent. All classes have smart boards. All lab equipments are very good. Our library is awesome, and has full of AC available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is awesome with Wi-Fi connections everywhere. Our college has a huge library with 3 floors filled with all sorts of academic as well as non-academic books. We are monitored by the camera inside the campus 24/7. If they find us doing any kind of bad activities, we will get suspended. Girls and boys are supposed to go to the hostel directly after the college. We are not supposed to roam outside in public. Our classrooms are quite good with smart systems. We have a huge canteen i...

college_info.college_name: B. K. Mody Government Pharmacy College

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for B. K. Mody Government Pharmacy College admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the B. K. Mody Government Pharmacy College:

placements.overview:
B. K. Mody Government Pharmacy College is an institute located in Rajkot, Gujarat. B. K. Mody Government Pharmacy College courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and PCI and offers courses in Full Time mode. B. K. Mody Government Pharmacy College offers a total of 5 courses in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Pharma, M.Pharma and D.Pharma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 205. These courses are offered to students across several specialisation such as Pharmaceutical. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 2,200 to 8,400 and the average median salary is around INR 1,95,600. Apart from this, the B. K. Mody Government Pharmacy College campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Q. What is the total fee for MPharm programme offered by BK Mody Government Pharmacy College?

Q. Is there an age limit for admissions in BPharm course offered by BK Mody Government Pharmacy College?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty members, good placements, and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 80 to 90% of students are placed in our course. Companies for our course are Zydus, Mankind, Cipla, etc. 70 to 90% of students got internships from our course in companies like Sun Pharma, Zydus, Torrent, etc. Top roles offered like marketing representative, QA & QC department, formulation, R&D department, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available. Our college government hostel is available. We have 24X7 water and electricity facilities. In our hostel, sports and games like badminton court, volleyball ground, table tennis court are available. In our hostel, mess is available. Security guard is available in our hostel 24X7.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: B. K. Mody Government Pharmacy College review.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of students from our college get placement offers. The average annual salary package is around 3-4 lakhs. About 40% of students get internships in leading pharmaceutical companies. Top roles offered are supervisor, worker in pharmaceutical companies, and pharmacist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and labs met all minimum requirements, and Wi-Fi was available. The library had most of the books I needed, and the hostel had minimum residential facilities. The hostel provided a tiffin service from an outside source. Sports facilities included table tennis, badminton, and volleyball.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A place where dreams of many have been fulfilled.

review_content.Placements: In terms of placement through college or from college, our college is quite poor. Of course, they help you gain jobs but placement is not that good. We have to go for internships at our own college; that doesn't play any role in that. So if you are looking for placement, I think, from my knowledge, it's not a good place.
review_content.Infrastructure: In terms of facilities, I would say 24-hour Wi-Fi and separate laboratories for each subject are available. Wide and well-air-conditioned classrooms are there, as is a very big library. The facilities in the hostel are the worst and I think I don't have to say anything about the food quality of the mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: My college is very good.

review_content.Placements: Many students get placement from this college in many companies. Top recruiters are Biocon, cipla baxter, Tirupati medicare, data zymes, Novartis, etc. 70% students get internships for BCA course and the companies for the same are baxter, Tirupati meficare, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good. The students take good care of the college property. Hostel’s rooms are clean like that of five star hotels. Hostel. Mess food quality is good and healthy.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are the most useful people for the students. They teach students in every situation and at any time. Semester exams are very hard for the students. Students try to pass the exams with good marks.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: BKMGPC - lead, innovative & achieve.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students were placed in the B. Pharma course. The Median Salary & Package is around INR 2 LPA. The highest salary offered is INR 4.5 LPA. The lowest salary is offered INR 1.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Zydus Cadila and Sun Pharma, INTAS Pharmaceuticals. The roles offered are as a pharmacist, production department, and QA & QC department. In the terms of Internships, no Data is available. Most students find an internship as their own. Most of the students go for Masters (around 80%) rather than go to Jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1. The college has Wi-Fi availability. The labs are well-equipped and well maintained with all new equipment. Classrooms are okay. In the library 28,844 books are available. Daily Newspapers are 4 (3-English, 1- Gujarati). E-Corner is also available with 10 internet Computers. Read on Room capacity is 90 students. College is already subscribed to most leading journals. 2. In the hostel, Sharing with 3 people in one room. The canteen food is okay. The sports ground is available in the Boys hostel for playing Cricket, volleyball, and kabaddi. Medical Facilities are available at the hostel as well as college. Fire Safety is also available and well maintained in hostels and colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of atmosphere in the college.

review_content.Placements: 1. 17% of students were placed from b. pharma. 2. 3.5 - 1.5 lacs per annum is the highest and the lowest salary offered. 3. Zydus cadila, sun pharma are the main companies recruiting here. Only 2% of students got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1. 24*7 Wi-Fi available, infrastructure is not good. Laboratories are bigger but do not have the required instrument. The ones which are available are not properly working (only for showoff ). 2. Food is not available in the hostel. Infrastructure is good, the medical facility is okay and there is good sports availability.

college_info.college_name: Geeta University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary:
The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for Geeta University admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: CUET, HSTES, JEE Main, CAT, MAT, CMAT

college_info.intro:
Geeta University offers UG, PG, and diploma courses across Engineering, Management, Commerce, Pharmacy, Computer Application, Agriculture Studies, Law, Nursing & Paramedical, and others. The popular programmes are BTech, MBA, and LLM.
Geeta University offers a four-year, full-time BTech programme across various specialisations such as CSE, Full Stack Web Development, Data Science & Business Analytics, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, and Cyber Security. The university also offers MBA specialisation in Finance, HR, Supply Chain Management, Pharmaceutical Management, and Marketing. The below-mentioned are Geeta University's popular programmes:

placements.overview: Geeta University admission 2025 is open. The university accepts admission based on merit and entrance exams. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best law college in Delhi NCR.

content.Placements: Students got placement in around 90 percent. All students are satisfied with the course placement. The highest package is 40 LPA but the average is 6 LPA. Internship rate is impressive, and 99 percent are from college. The roles of Lawyers are in a top position. Almost everyone got a placement and an internship opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: Moot courts for practice and experts are invited from outside for the real-world experiences. All necessary facilities are available at the campus only, so we do not need to go outside for small item purchases. Library access is 16 hours a day. We have in house ambulance, our Nescafé and café 14 is the best café we have in-house.

individual_reviews.course: BBA. LLB - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Geeta Institute of Law, Geeta University.

content.Placements: Almost all eligible students are in good places today. GIL assist well in placements. The highest package here is 36 LPA. Companies like Accenture are ones where students are placed. All eligible students got an opportunity for placements. It is good overall.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is good, airy, and it is also clean and green, located in a good place with nice surroundings. All labs and the library are well-equipped. Classrooms have smart boards. Food is good here at the mess. Food cafes are also good here. The hostel is fine here.

The library is filled with books but its small. Hostel is fine as I heard from the hostellers as I am a day scholar. The food in mess and canteen is fine.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) (Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am enjoying the vibrant atmosphere at Geeta University.

content.Placements: The number of placements was decent in my course. At least 80–90 percent got placements, and others opted for higher studies or went abroad to pursue their career in higher studies. Top recruiting companies that came to the campus included Wipro, TCS, HTL Ltd., and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and amenities provided at the campus were much better than what I observed in other institutes. Rather than just providing the best services, they maintained hygiene on the campus, in the mess, and in the classrooms as well. Here, I found the campus catered to services.

admission_overview.college_name: Geeta University Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: Geeta University admissionis open for various programmes. The university offers a wide range of programmes in the fields ofEngineering, Management, Commerce, and Pharmacyamong others such asBTech, BCom, MTech, etc.Geeta Universityaccepts applicants who satisfy the preset admission criteria of the desired programme. Students are selected based on several parameters including their past academic performance, entrance exam scores (if applicable), and more. Candidates willing to apply forGeeta University admission 2025are required to apply online by visiting the university's official website. If you want to know more about theGeeta University admission process 2025read the following article.

Geeta University course admissionis subject to the specific admission criteria set by the university. The university offers over 70 programmes in various fields. The university offers anonline mode of application. Candidates seeking admission to any courses are required to apply by visiting the university's official website. Interested students can check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularGeeta University courses:

Geeta University admissionprocessincludes filling out the application form and qualifying for the selection rounds. Students looking to get into the university need to ensure that they satisfy the preset admission criteria of the desired programme before applying. Eligible students can refer to the following steps to complete the admission process of the university:
Step1: Geeta UniversityApplication Process
Candidates are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria for all the courses, candidates need to fill out theapplication form online.
Step 2: Geeta University Selection Round

Geeta University selects candidates for some UG and diploma courses based on the last qualifying exam. Additionally, the university may take into consideration students' performance in the relevant entrance tests, such as CLAT/ JEE/ GATE/ MAT, etc. If required, students may have to appear for a personal interview conducted by the university.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The candidates selected for the course must complete their enrollment by submitting the seat booking amount within the given deadline.

faqs.answer: To secure admission to any desired course at Geeta University, candidates need to meet the respective eligibility set by the University. To be eligible for admission to UG courses candidates must have Class 10 and Class 12 scorecards and for PG courses candidates must have a graduation degree. The mode of application at Geeta University is online. Geeta University offers merit-based admission to all the courses.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Geeta Institute of Law, Geeta UniversityReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best law college in Delhi NCR.
reviews.review_text: Moot courts for practice and experts are invited from outside for the real-world experiences. All necessary facilities are available at the campus only, so we do not need to go outside for small item purchases. Library access is 16 hours a day. We have in house ambulance, our Nescafé and café 14 is the best café we have in-house.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Geeta Institute of Law, Geeta UniversityReviewed on 16 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My experience at Geeta Institute of Law, Geeta University.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good, airy, and it is also clean and green, located in a good place with nice surroundings. All labs and the library are well-equipped. Classrooms have smart boards. Food is good here at the mess. Food cafes are also good here. The hostel is fine here.

reviews.review_heading: Fine college and placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is fine sometimes it works, sometimes it does not. The labs are also fine. Classrooms have AC in them, and they are spacious. The library is filled with books but its small. Hostel is fine as I heard from the hostellers as I am a day scholar. The food in mess and canteen is fine.

reviews.review_heading: Good experience at Geeta University!
reviews.review_text: As a BCA AIML student, I can say that the course & curriculum are good here & it is running with advanced technologies. They have Geeta Technical Hub, which not only provides hands-on experience but also makes us industry-ready as they are associated with companies like AWS, CISCO, REDHAT, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am enjoying the vibrant atmosphere at Geeta University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and amenities provided at the campus were much better than what I observed in other institutes. Rather than just providing the best services, they maintained hygiene on the campus, in the mess, and in the classrooms as well. Here, I found the campus catered to services.

reviews.review_heading: Average, not too bad, and not too good. There are lots of fines for very small things.
reviews.review_text: As I am from the nutrition dietetics department, we have well-managed labs and a kitchen. They provide us with all the ingredients we need for cooking during Energy Week. Regarding the hostel, the food quality is overall good, and we have a unique option for ticket raising if we encounter any issues. We can create a ticket, and that goes to our HoD and VC of the college. They also provide us with the solution. They conduct an open house in which our own head of college interacts with students an...

reviews.review_heading: My overall campus life experience at Geeta University has been positive and enriching.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility at Geeta University is comfortable and well managed, making it convenient for students coming from different states. All the classrooms are fully air conditioned with smart boards. Infrastructure is high class. The mess food is decent and hygienic, offering a balanced menu with North Indian meals, occasional special dishes and options for vegetarian students.

reviews.review_heading: Appreciate the campus and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Geeta University is very good with a clean and green campus. Classrooms are modern, very spacious, and well equipped with smart boards and projectors. Wi-Fi connectivity is available throughout the campus. The library is excellent, quiet, peaceful, and well maintained with digital resources, ie e books and journals.

reviews.review_heading: My best time is learning and exploring.
reviews.review_text: The amenities provided by the management were truly commendable. A lot of diligence had been done in maintaining every classroom, lab, and especially the library, which was my favourite. I like to visit day in and day out here. The newspapers-reading area was well-maintained and very calm to sit. The hostel food was my favourite. What I like the most is snack time.

reviews.review_heading: I am really satisfied with the curriculum and college life. I learnt a lot during my internships.
reviews.review_text: Geeta University is automated, from attendance to grades to raising problems all things can be done online. Wi-Fi is available on the entire campus with your personal university id. Rooms and campus are neat & clean. Mess Food is really good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent core academics with vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: I am from the B.Tech CSE course. The most pressing issue is the consistent and low-bandwidth hostel Wi-Fi, which sometimes severely impacts necessary searches. Facilities are clean, and the routine maintenance response time is fast. Common areas are good for socializing, and there are quiet zones or a study room within the hostel. The class can accommodate almost 35-40 students.

reviews.review_heading: Geeta University: A good mix of learning and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: I would rate the course as fairly good. The mentorship is provided by Coding Clock mentors, and they teach really well. The labs are glass labs with 50–60 seats of capacity per lab, and there is fast Wi-Fi in every lab and classroom. However, there is no seminar hall in our CSE department.

reviews.review_heading: This college is allrounder. It provides you everything good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available. Labs were good. Library was excellent, where you could study peacefully. Gym was also available where you could work on your personality. Hostel facility was awesome. I will never complain about this. It was a good budget friendly college that provided you good skills with placement.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, labs are good, classrooms are good, and the library is good. I was a day scholar, but I heard the hostel was good. The food at the mess is fine, not like home, but fine. There are 3 canteens, medical facilities are available, and all types of sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, good hostel.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is fine, labs are fine. Classrooms are fine, the library is good, the hostel is good, and the food is also fine, not like home, but still good. The canteen is fine. There are 3 canteens. Medical facilities are also available, and sports events also happen. Students from other colleges also come.

data.description: Geeta university has a good state of art infrastructure with various facilities. Some of these facilities include Hostels, Conference hall, a Library, Labs, Sports, Modern Classrooms, Industry Sponsored Labs, Cafeteria & Tuck Shops, Transport Fleet, Banking Facility, 24hrs CCTV Surveillance, Medical Care Center, etc.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Geeta University

likes.text: This time many companies visited at our campus like Justdail, Maxlife Insurance, Genpect, Bajaj Capital, Centarl Park, Tech Mahindra, Dns Group, Icici Prudential etc.
The overall environment is excellent in this college, But in terms of study or discipline, I would recommend this college for students' future.

likes.text: Open-air auditorium for functions and well-maintained air-conditioner hostel with best quality food in the mess for the students is provided.
Our college has excellent infrastructure, along with laboratories, classrooms, a library, separate blocks and a seminar hall.

likes.text: This college is really good at everything because every student who wants will get a good education and placement opportunities from here.

paragraphs: Geeta University has affordable fee structure. The fee ranges between INR 1.04 lakh- INR 8.75 lakh. The university offers UG, PG, and Diploma courses across Engineering, Management, Commerce, Pharmacy, Computer Application, Agriculture Studies, Law, Nursing & Paramedical, and others. The fee strcuture includes multiple components, such as tuition fees, laboratory fees, security deposit, alumni fees, etc.

The course fee for BSc at Geeta Univerisity is INR 1.1 lakh yearly. The semester-wise tuition fee is INR 55,000. This fee is taken from official sources and hence, is indicative. Candidates are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the same.

Geeta University application fee is INR 1,000. Candidates can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. To fully submit the application form it is mandatory to pay the online fee. Without an application fee, the form is not submitted by the university.

highlights.summary: The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for College of Veterinary Science, Proddatur - Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: College of Veterinary Science, Proddatur - Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Science, and have a fee structure of around INR 19,840 to 46,695. UG programs include BVSC. Further, the PG programs include MVSC.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of placed students in the course is less than 50%. The highest package in the course is 150,000 thousand rupees, and top colleges are Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University. Most of the members will join internships, and other states also offer top roles in internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of available Wi-Fi is good and possible to use very nicely. Also, unlimited network will be available. Mostly, labs are very clean and nice, with practicals going on daily. The most important thing is that classrooms are too good, and there is also a library available for new things.

reviews_list.batch_info: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Very good college for those who are determined to be a veterinary doctor.

review_content.Placements: The placements depend on your GPA at the end of the academic course. Also, the placements in the veterinary department are decided by the government itself. If the government releases any posts, then only you could apply for them and would get a job based on your merit in the college. The highest salary for a beginner would be 30k, and that's an average salary pack too. The internship is offered by the college itself for a span of 6 to 8 months, and it's mandatory for every passed-out student.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are pretty clean and tidy. Each class has a green board along with a projector for smart classes, with a Wi-Fi connection separately for each class and lab. The library is composed of thousands of books regarding this course and also general knowledge too. The labs are well-equipped to assist students in learning quickly. Although the college is good, you can't expect much from a government hostel. Rooms might be clean, but the food isn't up to the mark. Daily cleaning would be there for the rooms, and there would be enough space for 3 persons to share.

reviews_list.batch_info: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: All the students get placed after completing the course either in the private or government sectors. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. The recruiting companies are Vencobb, BV hatcheries, and other pet clinics.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs in all the departments are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is not available in our college and hostel. The quality of food served is average. Hospital is available 2 kilometers away from the college. Hostel allots 3 students in a room.
