overview_faqs.question: Is College of Veterinary Science, Proddatur - Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at College of Veterinary Science, Proddatur - Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University are MVSC, BVSC. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, College of Veterinary Science, Proddatur - Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University has a rating of 4.3 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4, 4, 4.5 and 4 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: College of Veterinary Science, Proddatur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I'm completely okay with the college, and it's a decent platform for the upcoming future doctors.

content.Placements: There will be 70% of students placed every year in the BVSc & AH course. The highest average package ranges from 8 Lacs per annum to 9.75 Lacs per annum, and the lowest average package ranges from 2.8 Lacs per annum to 6 Lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies in this field are The Indian Veterinary Research Institute, PETA India, Terzetto Pharma Metrics, Amul Dairy, etc. The percentage of students who get internships in the Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (BVSc & AH) course varies by college and programme. There are many roles offered in this course like surgeon, breeder, and researcher.

individual_reviews.course: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: BVSC aims to save the animal life.

content.Placements: The percentage of placed students in the course is less than 50%. The highest package in the course is 150,000 thousand rupees, and top colleges are Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University. Most of the members will join internships, and other states also offer top roles in internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of available Wi-Fi is good and possible to use very nicely. Also, unlimited network will be available. Mostly, labs are very clean and nice, with practicals going on daily. The most important thing is that classrooms are too good, and there is also a library available for new things.

individual_reviews.course: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Very good college for those who are determined to be a veterinary doctor.

content.Placements: The placements depend on your GPA at the end of the academic course. Also, the placements in the veterinary department are decided by the government itself. If the government releases any posts, then only you could apply for them and would get a job based on your merit in the college. The highest salary for a beginner would be 30k, and that's an average salary pack too. The internship is offered by the college itself for a span of 6 to 8 months, and it's mandatory for every passed-out student.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are pretty clean and tidy. Each class has a green board along with a projector for smart classes, with a Wi-Fi connection separately for each class and lab. The library is composed of thousands of books regarding this course and also general knowledge too. The labs are well-equipped to assist students in learning quickly. Although the college is good, you can't expect much from a government hostel. Rooms might be clean, but the food isn't up to the mark. Daily cleaning would be there for the rooms, and there would be enough space for 3 persons to share.

individual_reviews.course: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: All the students get placed after completing the course either in the private or government sectors. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. The recruiting companies are Vencobb, BV hatcheries, and other pet clinics.
content.Infrastructure: Labs in all the departments are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is not available in our college and hostel. The quality of food served is average. Hospital is available 2 kilometers away from the college. Hostel allots 3 students in a room.

individual_reviews.course: BVSc in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of good infrastructure, teaching quality and facilities.

content.Placements: Maximum number of all the passed out graduates got jobs either in government or private sector. The private companies pay you about INR 45k after BVSC and between INR 65k to 70k in case of clinical departments. If you want to get government job you have to wait for a couple of years because there is no regular notification.
content.Infrastructure: The campus area is about 95 acres. Classrooms are of modern technology. The college doesn't provide Wi-Fi in both hostel and classrooms. The hostel rooms are not bad and not good. When it comes to food, it is average. For each room 3 beds and 3 fans are there for 3 students.

Amity University Kolkata placement 2026 details are not out yet. It will be updated once it is released. The university has a Centre for Career Development (ACCD) that ensures that all students seeking placement assistance get qualitative placement opportunities. According to the placement report for the year 2023, the highest package recorded for the BTech programme was INR 32.21 LPA. Further, some of the top recruiters that took part in the placement drive were Amazon, TCS, Cognizant, PWC, etc.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Amity University Kolkata?
overview_faqs.answer: In Amity University Kolkata, Application for withdrawal from the course is to be submitted through Amizone. The college not accepts other mode of request. Given below are refund guidelines for withdrawal of application:% of tuition fees paid If Student’s written notice of withdrawal is received: 100%(“Maximum Refund”) More than 60 days before theProgramme Commencement Date 25%Before, but not more than 60 days before theProgramme Commencement Date 10%After, but not more than 7 days after the Programme Commencement Date 5%More than 7 days after the ProgrammeCommencement Date, but not more than 14 daysafter the Programme Commencement Date 0%More than 14 days after the ProgrammeCommencement Date Refund will be processed on receipt of written request from the student. The refund will be made within 45 to 60 days from the date of receipt of refund application

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA courses at Amity University Kolkata?
overview_faqs.answer: Amity University Kolkata MBA fees include many components such as Tuition Fees, Examination Fees, Library Fees, etc. The total fee for course ranges between INR 8.7 lakh and INR 8.9 lakh. However this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students are advised to visit official website to learn more about same.

overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel withdrawal refund guidelines at Amity University Kolkata?
overview_faqs.answer: To withdraw the application from the hostel, candidates must submit their request through Amizone. Hostel fee once paid will not be refunded in case of withdrawal at any point in time. Further, the security deposits will be refunded after adjustment or clearance of any dues, such as the following:Alumni Life Member Fee @1000/- (Compulsory)IT Damage ChargesAdmin Damage ChargesCentral Library ChargesAcademics (Lab, Department Library/book bank, CRC, etc.)Examination DuesID Card Charges Rs. 500/- (If not returned)Any other dues (Gate pass Charges/Duplicate ID Card etc.)

review_summary.college_name: Amity University Kolkata Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Professional teachers with good skills.

content.Placements: Some of the emerging companies like L&T, Tata Housing, Godrej, and Sobha Developers took part in the recruitment drive of our college nowadays. But during our time of recruitment, only 5 to 8 companies were involved in recruitment. Various professional architects participated in the webinars to provide some chances for doing internships with their network.
content.Infrastructure: College events like promotions, cultural, and technical fests are conducted twice or thrice a month. A specific set of penalties and punishments is assigned for all the wrong behavior of us. Hostel premises are liberal, but accurate records are maintained. The usage of mobile phones within specified hours is allowed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Amity University Kolkata is really positive.

content.Placements: Percentage of students getting placed is approximately 60 percent in B.Tech computer science. Generally, at Amity University Kolkata students get placed at TCS, Deloitte, EY, SAP, etc. Top role offered in my course is SDE. The highest package is 28 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and average is 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Campus of the university is not that huge. It has spread over 15 acres of land. There are two academic blocks such as A and E blocks. The campus is located in the outer area of Kolkata. Classrooms are good. The campus is fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi enabled. Campus has a library consists of more than 10,000 books. Different types of labs such as Matlab, seminar halls, etc., are available. There are two canteens present on the campus that serve good quality food to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B (Hons.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Amity Law School is one of the best private law schools in West Bengal.

content.Placements: As this is a law course, majority of students here are not first-generation lawyers and often practice with their parents. Amity provides placements in the corporate sector and is very helpful about it. I am not aware of the highest or lowest package offered. Internships are provided by the college, but there are criteria, and not everyone gets them.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is on point, and the best that money can buy. Library is huge, and an entire spare building is allotted for it. You will find all the books you can imagine. College also provides an online e-library that gives you a subscription to SCC online and manupatra.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is good but academics are not good.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students were placed in our course. Other than this, some students were also recruited for irrelevant jobs. The average package was around 5 LPA. The highest package was about 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Accenture, Capgemini, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Our college had world class infrastructure. It provided Wi-Fi campus, big classroom, very furnished labs, and library with lots of books. Quality of hostel was also good. Limited sports facility was available. It had basic medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical and Automation Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of campus and academics, good placement for B.Tech.

content.Placements: More than 70% of students got placed with a median salary of Rs 50,000 monthly. The highest package was around 7 LPA last year. The lowest was 4 LPA. Average was around 6 LPA. Volvo, Manhindra & Mahindra, Reliance, and Honda were the top recruiters. 100% of students were offered internships by IT companies like TCS, Wipro, etc. Core companies like Reliance, Mahindra, and Tata. Retail, operations, and QC/QA are the top roles along with some R&D.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, functional labs, spacious classrooms, centralized library, and canteen are available. Other high-quality facilities include hostel, ATM, cafe coffee day, water coolers, elevator, centralized air conditioning, clinic, sports complex including gym and swimming pool, basketball court, cricket pitch, football field, etc.

admission_overview.title: Amity University Kolkata Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Amity University Kolkata admissions 2026 are entrance and merit-based. Students must apply for entrance exams like JEE Mains, CUET, CAT, etc. Amity University Kolkata offers more than twenty courses under several streams such as Engineering, Science, Arts, Commerce, Management, Design, Law, etc. Students must fulfill the eligibility criteria, and submit the application form by visiting the admission portal of the university.

faqs.answer: A score of at least 50% aggregate is required to study BBA and BCA at Amity University in Kolkata. It is required to score 55% in Class 12 to study BTech. Most postgraduate courses demand students to have graduated with at least 50%. You become eligible to participate after checking the required percentages.

faqs.answer: Most applicants must fulfill the requirements before they can be admitted to Amity University Kolkata. Getting into some colleges demands either good performance or a passing score on tests like JEE, CAT or CUET. Still, there might be extra admission rules for certain courses. The official admission office is the right place to find out about such alternatives.
faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Amity University Kolkata?

paragraphs: Amity University Kolkata admission processstarts with checking academic qualifications and entrance test scores followed by submission of required documents. Students can begin with the registration process followed by selection rounds. Check the step-by-step Amity Kolkata admission process:
Amity University Kolkata Application

Students meet the eligibility requirement can apply online on the official website of the university. Contenders need to pay a non-refundable application fee of INR 1,500. Once the payment is done, students can download their forms for future reference.
Selection Rounds
Students selection are done on the basis of national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CUET-UG, CAT, MAT, etc. for specific courses. Admission is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.
Admission Confirmation

After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted students have to come for document verification. The seat allotment is done based on the performance of the candidates in the selection rounds. Students need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

courses_data.name: Amity University Kolkata BTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Amity Kolkata offers four-year BTech course spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech in multiple specialisations like Biotechnology, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech admission in Amity University Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 55% aggregate in PCB or PCM are eligible to take admission. In addition, the students with 80% and above aggregate in Class 12 (CBSE/ISC/State-Boards) are exempted from the selection process. Further, depending upon the BTech specialisation, the candidate should have studied particular subjects in class 12, such as Physics, Chemistry, and Maths (PCM) or Biology (PCB). Read more about Amity Kolkata BTech course admissionhere.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Amity University Kolkata BTech?
faqs.answer: Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria can apply. The eligible students can visit the official website (amity.edu) and submit a duly filled application form online. Candidates can also submit the application form offline. Further, based on performance in JEE Main/Amity JEE followed by group discussion and personal interview, the seat allotments are carried out.

faqs.question: How good is doing an MBA course in Amity University, Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Amity University Kolkata offers a two-year long MBA program. The placements in the MBA programme are impressive with an average placement package of INR 40,000, the highest package offered is INR 60,000, while the lowest is INR 28,000. Prominent organisations that actively recruit from the university include Deloitte, PWC, KPMG, Byju's, ITC, Nestle, Flipkart, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank. Senior analyst and assistant manager are the most common positions offered to the students.

faqs.question: Is CUET compulsory for Amity University Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Amity University, Kolkata bases its admission into its various courses based on merit and nationally accepted entrance exams. The university welcomes candidates to apply for specific courses using national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CAT, CUET, and others. Each course offered by the university requires a different entrance exam score. Some of the courses like BCA/BCA (Hons), BBA, and BBA LLB (Hons) offer admission based on merit/CUET-UG exam conducted by the NTA along with a minimum score of 50% in Class 12. The university also conducts its entrance exam in addition to a Personal Interview for admissions.

faqs.question: What is the basic eligibility for BBA at Amity University Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate in any stream from a recognised school board is the basic eligibility for a full-time BBA programme offered at Amity University Kolkata.

The Amity Centre for Career Development (ACCD) employs experienced and knowledgeable professionals who are experts in different job markets. This team collaborates with the industry partners who provide opportunities such as placement, guest lectures, internships, curriculum contributions, workshops, and industry agreements. Regular counselling is held for students in their pre-final and final years by these teams. Moreover, the team identifies the training requirements of students looking for job placement and the organisation of training in soft skills and aptitude skills.

nirf.description:
Amity University Kolkata has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Amity University Kolkata indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF.
It has been noticed that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Amity University Kolkata's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Architecture and Planning' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Amity University Kolkata's rank is #25, the same as last year's rank in the 'Architecture and Planning' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Kolkata Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Professional teachers with good skills.
reviews.review_text: College events like promotions, cultural, and technical fests are conducted twice or thrice a month. A specific set of penalties and punishments is assigned for all the wrong behavior of us. Hostel premises are liberal, but accurate records are maintained. The usage of mobile phones within specified hours is allowed.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Amity University Kolkata is really positive.
reviews.review_text: Campus of the university is not that huge. It has spread over 15 acres of land. There are two academic blocks such as A and E blocks. The campus is located in the outer area of Kolkata. Classrooms are good. The campus is fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi enabled. Campus has a library consists of more than 10,000 books. Different types of labs such as Matlab, seminar halls, etc., are available. There are two canteens present on the campus that serve good quality food to the students.

reviews.review_heading: Amity Law School is one of the best private law schools in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is on point, and the best that money can buy. Library is huge, and an entire spare building is allotted for it. You will find all the books you can imagine. College also provides an online e-library that gives you a subscription to SCC online and manupatra.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good but academics are not good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Our college had world class infrastructure. It provided Wi-Fi campus, big classroom, very furnished labs, and library with lots of books. Quality of hostel was also good. Limited sports facility was available. It had basic medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of campus and academics, good placement for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, functional labs, spacious classrooms, centralized library, and canteen are available. Other high-quality facilities include hostel, ATM, cafe coffee day, water coolers, elevator, centralized air conditioning, clinic, sports complex including gym and swimming pool, basketball court, cricket pitch, football field, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Great college life, average placement. Enjoyed 2 years of fests - Amity hosts the best in Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is easily accessible throughout the Amity campus. The labs and classrooms are very good, and I can say the library is the best I have seen compared to other colleges. The facilities in our hostel are of high quality. The food in the canteen is much better than that in other college canteens, and the prices are affordable for everyone.

reviews.review_heading: I did a master's from Amity University, Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: Amity University, Kolkata, has a huge campus and provides a lot of facilities. There are gallery classrooms, AC, Wi-Fi, a library, and labs. In total, there are 3 canteens on campus. There is also an infirmary on the campus with a nurse and a doctor present. Amity has a yearly sports fest called Sangathan.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, and helpful faculties, but needs a bit of transparent placement process.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel and college is absolutely amazing. It has top-notch facilities, with good Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, and a huge library with all kinds of books needed for courses. There are three canteens, all serving hygienic and vegetarian food. There are also many shops outside the college that serve non-vegetarian food, which can be brought into the college canteens to sit and eat.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about Amity Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, in fact, one of the best I've seen in Kolkata. Wi-Fi is provided, there are good labs and desktops, and a peaceful library, though it has fewer informative books. Medical facilities include AC rooms. The sports ground is very small, but it is encouraged through several programs such as Sangathan, which is a department-wise sports competition.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure were on point in every aspect or department like multiple A/C or Wi-Fi available, all kinds of labs and classrooms high-quality sports equipment, and facilities with skilled coaches. There was a theatre and also a cafeteria. The hostel was the best in the town with ample facilities and luxury. The food in the cafeteria was good and the most important the medical facilities were 24-hour and we got a separate infirmary.

reviews.review_heading: Eventful college life will make you fall in love with the university.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities provided by the university. The lab, Wi-Fi, classroom, library, and canteen are top-anotch. There are 3-4 canteen and all have good food with reasonable price. The library is very well maintained. You have a quiet and personal space for each student.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University is home away from home.
reviews.review_text: There is full Wi-Fi connection on campus. The infrastructure of our college is beautiful. The college is full of greenery. Classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned. The whole college is equipped with air-conditioners. The food quality  is good and tasty and they maintain hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Students can join this college without any hesitation.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are very well-maintained. The library is very big and peaceful. It has a sports complex and other activities. There is a basketball ground and a badminton court in the college. But we do not have any cricket ground but there we can play football in a small area.

reviews.review_heading: There are really good infrastructure and faculty members in the college.
reviews.review_text: Amity University has a library with comfortable and silent surroundings. This university has 5 blocks. The examination block is separate from other blocks and 4 blocks are for classes for different courses. The university has a sports complex with different games.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of Amity University Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great starting from the Wi-Fi connection, all the items you need for labs. Classrooms are nice. The library is also well-maintained. You would get every book that you would need for your course. Hostel facilities are also awesome. The quality of the mess and canteen is also above average. There are proper medical facilities available and sports and games are given equal attention.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Amity University, Kolkata

Amity University Kolkata will offer a variety of courses in 2024 at varied tuition costs. The cost of tuition for an MBA or PGDM programme is INR 8 lakh. For students looking to pursue engineering and technology can enrol in the B.E./B.Tech programs, which have fees ranging from INR 4.3 lakh to INR 8.9 lakh. Furthermore, Amity University Kolkata offers a B.Sc. programme that ranges in tuition from INR 2.1 lakh to INR 3.9 lakh, making it an attractive option for individuals with a scientific bent. The university's dedication to providing high-quality instruction in a range of subject areas is reflected in its diverse fee structure.

The application fee for various UG and PG courses offered at Amity University Kolkata is INR 1,100. The application fee is payable online via a debit/ credit card or net banking. Only after the submission of the fee, an application is successfully submitted. Candidates must also keep the fee submission receipt copy.

individual_reviews.title: I would recommend students to join this college.

content.Placements: There are no such ample opportunities that MBBS or Ayurveda. All students get internships because it is a government college. If students are looking for a PG homeopathic college then this is a good option as the stipend is good at PG.
content.Infrastructure: Our college does not provide a bus facility. Ambulance is also not available on campus. The washrooms are not clean. In the classrooms, around 70 students can seat comfortably but 125 students have to manage. Our college comes among the top 10 homeopathic medical colleges in India.

content.Infrastructure: All the facilities in our college are average. Clinical exposure in hospitals is very low as the college and hospital do not focus on advertisement. The library always seems to be closed. Exams for students of other colleges are regularly held in our institute, which affects our studies badly.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Sardar Patel Education Campus are BE, BVoc, and ME. The institute offers a wide range of programmes at the UG and PG levels. These programmes are offered to students across several specialisations such as Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Teaching & Education, etc.
Further, the SPEC technical courses are affiliated with the Gujarat Technological University, while its other courses are affiliated with the Sardar Patel University. These courses are offered to students in full-time mode and are AICTE-approved. These programmes strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the Sardar Patel Education Campus popular programmes in the table given below:

placements.overview:
Sardar Patel Education Campus has a Placement Cell that organises career guidance programmes for all the students starting from the first year. The cell is responsible for arranging training programmes such as Mock Interviews, Group Discussions, Communication Skills Workshop, etc. The placement cell also organises Public Sector Exam Training for students who are interested in joining the Government Sector. It also invites HR of renowned companies from different sectors to conduct training programmes for final-year students.

Recently, Sardar Patel Education Campus concluded the placements for the Class of 2024 with 85% placements. As per the latest report, the highest and average packages offered during Sardar Patel Education Campus placements 2024 stood at INR 10 LPA and INR 3 LPA, respectively. The lowest package offered stood at INR 2.5 LPA. More than participated in the placement process and placed students with new-age job roles. reviews_list.review_title: In 2022 almost 80% of students got placed.

review_content.Placements: I am a pharmaceutical student. The percentage of placement is around 80%, and the packages are around 400,000 per annum. The highest package in our college is 11 lakhs, the lowest is 2 lakhs, and the average is 3.5 lakhs. Mainly after the Master of Pharmacy, the students get jobs in pharmaceutical companies, and they also have jobs in the professor line in the college. The college also provides professor jobs to alumni students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college hostels are mostly not college hostels; it's a collaborative hospital. They are available in PG or day scholar hostel form. They provide mess, Wi-Fi, and other facilities, and indoor and outdoor sport facilities. College classrooms are smart classrooms. There are smart LED screens, AC, Wi-Fi, and a computer lab available at the college campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors in Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Sardar Patel Education Campus review.

review_content.Placements: According to me, about 80-90 percent of students were placed from our college. The highest package is around 4-5 PA and the lowest is 2 LPA. Average package is around 3-3.5 LPA. Top recruiters are First bank, SBI, Amazon, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is amazing. All the facilities including Wi-Fi, labs and best classroom environment are provided in our college. The facilities of hostel are also good. The quality of food is good. Every type of the food item is available in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I suggest going to Charusat or Parul University if you have money.

review_content.Placements: Maybe 85% of students got placed. The average package is 3 LPA-10 LPA, and 10 LPA is the highest. Infosys, Reliance, ICICI Bank, and Cipla. 50% of students got internships in Reliance and Infosys, I guess. There are no top roles offered in companies, they only suggest lower roles that help us to understand.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has good labs and library, but not that good. No hostel is available. You have to arrange a hostel on your own. Canteen food is the worst and very expensive. They have a medkit, kind of, but not like good for emergencies, as the college is very far from any hospital. Sports and games are very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for information technology.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in our course. The highest salary package offered in our course is 10 LPA. Companies provide internships. TCL is the top recruiting company for information technology courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very big and good. High-speed Wi-Fi is provided to complete the project. Our college has a good seminar hall for presentation. Labs and workshops are available for project performance. Canteen serves good and hygienic food for students. Library is big that contains more than 2000 books for our course.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides the best placements.

review_content.Placements: Almost 40% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. Sun Pharma, Jio, and Reliance are the top recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus has high-speed Wi-Fi facility. Air-conditioners are also available in our classrooms. It also provides a good library, and several books are available. Our campus environment is good.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful in our college. They are well-qualified from good universities. They are polite and helpful to us in our studies. Semester exams are averagely difficult.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It has very good faculty and many other things, so you can visit the college site socp.org.

review_content.Placements: Our college had a good placement facility. The top recruiters were Cadila, Zydus, Sun Pharma, etc., that visited our campus for placements. Almost ten companies came for the placements in the previous year. Many students got selected for jobs. The highest salary package offered for this year was 10 LPA, and it was very good for a beginner.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had no hostel, but nearby, many hostels were available. In Vidyanagar, you can find many boys and girls hostels and PGs near the college. These hostels and PGs had good facilities and were in a reasonable price range. So, you can find it on Google by searching.

The college offers over 10 courses in various streams such as Pharmacy, Engineering, Education, etc.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for courses at SPEC?

faqs.answer: Candidates can choose from various courses at SPEC, which can be of different course levels such as UG, PG, or Certificate. The eligibility and the selection criteria for the course depends upon the course and course level. The commoneligibility for the UG courses is that candidates are required to have cleared Class 12. admission_process.title: Sardar Patel Education Campus Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sardar Patel Education Campus's admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in the SPEC:
STEP 1: Sardar Patel Education Campus Application Process 2025
Aspirants seeking admission at SPEC for various courses must apply offline/online. Candidates must visit the official website to download the application form.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
The selection criteria at SPEC are a mix of entrance exams and merit-based. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification per the college's respective courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Students can checkSardar Patel Education Campus cutoffdetails here. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

placement_report.college_name: Sardar Patel Education Campus Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Sardar Patel Education Campus Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Sardar Patel Education Campus has a Placement Cell that organizes career guidance programs for all the students starting from the first year. The cell is responsible for arranging training programs like Mock Interviews, Group Discussions, Communication Skills Workshop, etc. The placement cell also organizes Public Sector Exam Training for students who are interested in joining the Government Sector. It also invites HR of renowned companies from different sectors to conduct training programs for final-year students.

Recently, Sardar Patel Education Campus concluded the placements for the Class of 2024 with 85% placements . As per the latest report, the highest and average packages offered during Sardar Patel Education Campus placements 2024 stood at INR 10 LPA and INR 3 LPA, respectively. The lowest package offered stood at INR 2.5 LPA. More than 100 recruiters participated in the placement process and placed students with new-age job roles. The top recruiters of S ardar Patel Education Campus include Nirma, Airtel, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Reliance Jio, Ajio Business, ICICI Bank, DMart, Axis Bank, Justdial, etc.

cut_off.college_name: Sardar Patel Education Campus Cutoff 2025: Check GUJCET Previous Years Ranks

description: Sardar Patel Education Campus cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The Sardar Patel Education Campus cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Sardar Patel Education Campus BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 28961 and 50504 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.E. in Electrical Engineering. The first round

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.E. in Electrical Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 28961 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.E. in Computer Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of and , respectively.

Sardar Patel Education Campus accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Sardar Patel Education Campus can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

The Sardar Patel Education Campus GUJCET cutoff 2024 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for admission to engineering and pharmacy courses at the UG level. The cutoff was released across categories in the AI and HS quotas. Considering the Sardar Patel Education Campus BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the minimum closing ranks required among the general HS category students was 28961.

Sardar Patel Education Campus accepts the GUJCET entrance exam, followed by a counseling process for admission to its BE and BTech courses. In the table below, candidates can view the past three years' cutoff trends for different courses, specialisations, rounds, and categories.
In 2024, the final round cutoff of the course stood at 28961. The cutoff for the same course was 28666 in 2023.

For the academic year 2025, Sardar Patel Education Campus accepts GUJCET 2025 entrance exam score for admission to BE/BTech and BPharma courses followed by the counselling process. The counselling dates are yet to be announced. Candidates seeking admission to Sardar Patel Education Campus can refer to the table below for GUJCET 2025 important dates.

Sardar Patel Education Campus GUJCET 2024 counselling was concluded with the release of the Round 3 Seat Allotment Result. Candidates can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise counselling PDFs to check the GUJCET cutoffs.

reviews.review_heading: In 2022 almost 80% of students got placed.
reviews.review_text: The college hostels are mostly not college hostels; it's a collaborative hospital. They are available in PG or day scholar hostel form. They provide mess, Wi-Fi, and other facilities, and indoor and outdoor sport facilities. College classrooms are smart classrooms. There are smart LED screens, AC, Wi-Fi, and a computer lab available at the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Sardar Patel Education Campus review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is amazing. All the facilities including Wi-Fi, labs and best classroom environment are provided in our college. The facilities of hostel are also good. The quality of food is good. Every type of the food item is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest going to Charusat or Parul University if you have money.
reviews.review_text: College has good labs and library, but not that good. No hostel is available. You have to arrange a hostel on your own. Canteen food is the worst and very expensive. They have a medkit, kind of, but not like good for emergencies, as the college is very far from any hospital. Sports and games are very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for information technology.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very big and good. High-speed Wi-Fi is provided to complete the project. Our college has a good seminar hall for presentation. Labs and workshops are available for project performance. Canteen serves good and hygienic food for students. Library is big that contains more than 2000 books for our course.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best placements.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has high-speed Wi-Fi facility. Air-conditioners are also available in our classrooms. It also provides a good library, and several books are available. Our campus environment is good.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good faculty and many other things, so you can visit the college site socp.org.
reviews.review_text: Our college had no hostel, but nearby, many hostels were available. In Vidyanagar, you can find many boys and girls hostels and PGs near the college. These hostels and PGs had good facilities and were in a reasonable price range. So, you can find it on Google by searching.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has average teachers and facilities, but don't have placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There was a Wi-Fi facility. We are authorised to use that for our work, but we had to do registration. Very slow speed internet facility is available in labs. There was one unshaped ground where students can play football, cricket and volleyball. But they cannot freely play as it was very small for such sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for those students who want to study abroad.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of department is average because after completion of every semester they make the Labs, and Wi-Fi which they never provide us. There is no hostel facility for out of city student. The good things is only they provide best sport.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the staff and culture.
reviews.review_text: The college provides all the normal facilities like lab and classrooms. There are labs but not well configured. The library doesn't have any useful book for any subject. The canteen is only for the namesake, and there is the food with the worst quality. There is no hostel facility at all. Sports and games are only seen on the notice board. There is not even enough playground for students relaxation.

reviews.review_heading: Overall our college is average in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The college has a 3-storey building and more than 50 rooms and labs. It facilitates with Wi-Fi and LAN connectivity. There is a canteen, but the canteen staff is not providing much more facility for food and all. The overall infrastructure of the college is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and facilities provided over here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided over here are quite good. I like the college building and the facilities in the laboratory. They usually provide everything in the laboratory for the experiment purpose. In the library, there are so many books for reading. The classes are held mostly digitally over here.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is awesome, good in all things.
reviews.review_text: In college, facilities like labs, library, Wi-Fi, sports and many more are available. Our college canteen food is good and fresh. Class rooms are neat and clean. In library, there are so many books related to our studies.

answer.text: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides a fantastic learning environment.

content.Placements: Our college had excellent placement opportunities. The placement cell was very active and supportive. It provided us with regular training sessions and mock interviews. Last year, the placement rate was around 80%. The average salary package was 7 LPA. Many top companies visited our campus for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Our college was the best college in Uttar Pradesh. Best academic facilities were available in our college. It provided air-conditioned classrooms equipped with audio visuals aids for effective lectures. It had fully equipped labs for pharmacy courses with necessary instruments, chemical, and equipments. It had modern computer system with broadband internet and power backup. There was a fully air-conditioned library with reputed journals, books, and newspapers.

library.description:
The library has 425 titles with 4000 volumes of books of Department of Pharmacy and 325 titles with 3115 volumes of books of Department of Management, relevant to the course. It also includes the books related to humanities, science and computers. Library also subscribes to more than 30 journals of national and international repute for bachelor of Pharmacy course and more than 15 journals of national and international repute for Master in Business Management.
Daily news papers and magazines are the regular feature of the library. The library is fully air conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a fantastic learning environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college was the best college in Uttar Pradesh. Best academic facilities were available in our college. It provided air-conditioned classrooms equipped with audio visuals aids for effective lectures. It had fully equipped labs for pharmacy courses with necessary instruments, chemical, and equipments. It had modern computer system with broadband internet and power backup. There was a fully air-conditioned library with reputed journals, books, and newspapers.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is good.
reviews.review_text:
The college offers well-equipped labs for Pharmaceutical Chemistry Pharmacognosy, Pharmacology, and Pharmaceutics. A spacious library with updated textbooks, reference books, and access to online journals
Collaboration with local hospital for hospital training and clinical exposure, especially in the final year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good.
reviews.review_text: The college offers well-equipped labs for pharmaceutical chemistry, pharmacognosy, pharmacology, and Pharmaceutics. A spacious library with updated textbooks, reference books, and access to online journals. Collaboration with the local hospital for hospital training and clinical exposure, especially in the final year.

reviews.review_heading: The improving environment of university of Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The campus in brimming with canteens. You can find these around every corner. The botanical garden as well as grounds are well-maintained. So, you can easily enjoy the peace under a tree. The Tagore Library is one of the best features of the university campus. Fully air-conditioned with specific sections available for different purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and a decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has proper sitting arrangements in classrooms with a speaker facility. There are currently 18 working laboratories with proper equipment. All the required chemicals are available for experiments. Canteen is average with limited items.

reviews.review_heading: It has very dedicated teachers, good placements, very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is ideal for students, and it is very environment friendly. Lecture halls are spacious, ventilated and well-furnished with all the teaching aids such as black and whiteboards and good sound systems for effective delivery of lectures. Laboratories are well-equipped with all the machines and instruments required. The library in our college is an ideal place for reading and contains many study materials for every subject. Area-wise, the library is huge. Hostels are ideal for stud...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I enjoyed college life with the best teachers, active juniors and supporting seniors.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was quite pleasant, and everything was available like ground, labs, auditorium and canteen. The library was a great support during exams with the availability of all books required. Everything was on point, as the ethics, academics and co-curricular activities. We had our best time.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for the overall personality development of students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. The library has over 10,000 books of different courses and interests along with the international journals published. The ambiance of the hostel is good, and a good facility for first aid is also available. Sports and events here are mandatory as it is also needed to develop the personality and skills along with the education.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college years.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was very big. It had a huge space including great parking areas, a large ground, and well-furnished classrooms. Cold water facilities and a canteen were available. Hostel facilities were also provided, and many students from different cities joined the hostel. I belonged to Lucknow.

reviews.review_heading: I highly recommend this college to those who are serious about studying with the best faculty & grea
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was decent, with well maintained classrooms and basic facilities. The campus was clean, and the staff ensured that students had access to the necessary resources for their studies. The college had different playgrounds for different activities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because I learn a lot from here.
reviews.review_text: The labs, Wi-Fi, and library facilities are all excellent. Food quality is very good, including nutritious meals like pulses, along with breakfast, lunch, evening snacks, and dinner. There are grounds for sports and games, and they provide medical facilities in emergencies; first aid assistance is also available. The warden is very supportive. Games are available for every student, and teachers engage in activities with students to support them and boost their morale. Free Wi-Fi is accessible in...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aryakul Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: The campus has the best-utilised things for the nature and environment. It has a lush green campus that instantly fresh everyone's soul. The hostel mess and canteen facility were good with 24 hours. It also provides a power supply and Wi-Fi facility for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for pharmacy and other courses in UP.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good and environment friendly. There are different laboratory available for different subjects. And also provide Wi-Fi for better study. AC facilities provided in all classes. Classrooms and labs are well maintained and provided all equipment for performing practicals. Canteen hotel is also good. Medical facilities are available. Events are organized time to time as sports seminars and cultural events which exploring the students talent.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, Faculties are very nice. The infrastructure is very good. Facilities are available.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities in our college are very good. Wi-Fi is good. The classrooms are very nice.
Labs were good. 
The library is good. All books are available, like standard books, Indian Pharmacopeia, British Pharmacopeia, europian pharmacopeia. All instrument and chemical glassware are available.
Software is available like ex. Pharma software use in a pharmacology course.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions course fee ranges between INR 90,000 to 12,84,000.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, placement, and faculty.

review_content.Placements: There is a wide range of placement opportunities in various job roles and at reputed companies. Roles that have high placement are sales executive, business development executive, HR executive, and education backgrounds. TCS, HCL, Zaro, KPMG, and many more companies visit for campus recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: The best thing about this college is its infrastructure. It has a beautiful campus. There are many places to explore, but one thing I dislike is the unhygienic washrooms. The water doesn't taste nice. As a day scholar, all I can say is that it has good infrastructure and a beautiful campus.

review_content.Placements: 96% of eligible students got placed in bachelor of business administration. The lowest package is about 3.5 LPA, and the highest is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS and other famous companies in bachelor of business administration.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college life journey.

content.Placements: No, college does not provide internship opportunities, but placements are provided as various companies come to recruit students in best companies. Many companies like TCS, Accenture, Mendenious, Learning Routes, Planet Spark, and various EdTech or sales companies.
content.Infrastructure: Sports labs and many activities are conducted, like management games, to enhance skills of students. Yes, in my college there is separate boys and girls hostel in the college campus, and there is very good infrastructure and safety around the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because it provides a good environment for learning.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing a BCA at this college, my batch is 2026, and this is my final year. In this college, the placement is average for BCA students, but for my batch, our faculty members worked hard for our placement. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, and other tech companies coming for placement. Many seniors are placed on campus in a good package. The highest package is 15.50 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: My college's infrastructure is excellent, and the classrooms are also very good, but Wi-Fi connection is not provided for students. The labs are good, but some computers do not work properly. The library has good books available. I am not a hosteler, but my friend is a hosteler, and they told me the food quality is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, placement, and faculty.

content.Placements: There is a wide range of placement opportunities in various job roles and at reputed companies. Roles that have high placement are sales executive, business development executive, HR executive, and education backgrounds. TCS, HCL, Zaro, KPMG, and many more companies visit for campus recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: The best thing about this college is its infrastructure. It has a beautiful campus. There are many places to explore, but one thing I dislike is the unhygienic washrooms. The water doesn't taste nice. As a day scholar, all I can say is that it has good infrastructure and a beautiful campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The college is good for admission.

content.Placements: I passed in the 2021 batch, and 60% of students got placed at that time. Alembic, Abbott, and other pharmaceutical companies come to my college. The top roles offered in my course are pharmacist, and many other roles in pharmaceutical companies, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of my college are very good. They have the best classroom with a practical lab. The library is also good, and Wi-Fi is available. The hostel facilities are good, and the rooms are good. The mess is also good. The medical facilities are also available, as they have a hospital on campus. For sports, they have a big ground, a basketball court, a volleyball court, etc.

admission_process.title: MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions considers scores in MPGI Entrance Test, UP B.Ed JEE, and CBSE 10th for admission to specific courses.MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutionsoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 54 months - 5 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 90,000 - 12,84,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,22,400 - 1,33,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

hostel_campus.college_name: MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My college life journey.
reviews.review_text: Sports labs and many activities are conducted, like management games, to enhance skills of students. Yes, in my college there is separate boys and girls hostel in the college campus, and there is very good infrastructure and safety around the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because it provides a good environment for learning.
reviews.review_text: My college's infrastructure is excellent, and the classrooms are also very good, but Wi-Fi connection is not provided for students. The labs are good, but some computers do not work properly. The library has good books available. I am not a hosteler, but my friend is a hosteler, and they told me the food quality is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, placement, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The best thing about this college is its infrastructure. It has a beautiful campus. There are many places to explore, but one thing I dislike is the unhygienic washrooms. The water doesn't taste nice. As a day scholar, all I can say is that it has good infrastructure and a beautiful campus.

reviews.review_heading: Life in Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of MPGI (Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions) is generally known for providing modern facilities and a conducive learning environment. While specific details can vary across different campuses (like Kanpur, Lucknow, etc), there's a general overview of the typical infrastructure provided by MPGI.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for admission.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of my college are very good. They have the best classroom with a practical lab. The library is also good, and Wi-Fi is available. The hostel facilities are good, and the rooms are good. The mess is also good. The medical facilities are also available, as they have a hospital on campus. For sports, they have a big ground, a basketball court, a volleyball court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It's average because they do not offer any internship and training programs.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available on campus, Labs are sufficient, and classrooms are pretty good and clean but seats are not comfortable, Library is also great. The quality of food in mess and canteen is good. They offer hygienic food, and medical facilities are also at top. Sports and games are not actively conducted.

reviews.review_heading: MPGI has proven with time and merit that we are here to provide excel.
reviews.review_text: Apart from higher education, it has 3 international schools in Kanpur and 2 international schools in New Delhi. The flagship Mandhana campus is developed on 50 acres of land with half of it comprising of constructed buildings, one-fourth dedicated to landscaping and one-fourth dedicated to the sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharana Pratap College of professional studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent and campus is very big along with greenery. We have different facilities for students like cafeteria, banks, etc. Different grounds are available for different games like cricket, volleyball, basketball, etc. The food quality of the canteen is also excellent.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has a really good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: There is a free Wi-Fi connection available. 4 to 5 labs, with each lab consisting of 35 to 40 computer systems. Classrooms are well with a seating capacity of 60 students. Fans are also there in classrooms, with 8 fans in each classroom. The hostel facilities are average, not too much good. The food available in the mess is average. There is a hospital in my college and a medical store.

reviews.review_heading: Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions is good and has a great campus crowd.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and has a large campus. Proper labs and libraries are available with Wi-Fi facility. Hostel life is enjoyable and memorable. The hostel mess is good and maintains hygiene. A variety of food is available here.

reviews.review_heading: MPGI is a good college and has a good crowd on the campus.
reviews.review_text: Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions has very good infrastructure. The campus is crowded. We have a proper lab. A library is available with Wi-Fi. Hostel life is enjoyable and relaxing. The mess is good and hygienic. A variety of food items are available in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions' infrastructure is too good and has a large campus.
reviews.review_text: Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions' infrastructure is too good and has a large campus. Proper labs and libraries are available with Wi-Fi facilities, but classrooms are not cleaned properly. Hostel life is enjoyable and relaxing. The hostel mess is good and maintains hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions is good for college life .
reviews.review_text:
Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions infrastructure is too good and has a crowded campus with proper labs and libraries available. 
Classrooms are not cleaned properly. 
Hostel life is enjoyable, and the hostel mess is good and maintains hygiene, and the food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in classes, and the furniture are very bad condition in pharmacy classes. Usual books are not present in the library; only unnecessary books are available in the pharmacy library. Medium-quality facilities are available in the hostel of MPGI. No medical facilities are available in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our classrooms are not clean. The college has a lab and a library. Hostel life is good. The mess food is average but maintains hygiene. Proper sports are available here a basketball court, cricket pitch, and volleyball court.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions

likes.text: The top recruiting companies like HCL, Amazon, TCS, Coforge, Infosys, Wipro, Walmart, Cognizant, and many more.
They recruit students and offers positions like software developer, QA, Software engineer etc.

likes.text: Our college provides us with all facilities like an auditorium, classrooms have projectors for better learning, Wi-Fi is enabled in computer labs and ethernet support for fast networks.
Our boys and girls hostels are very good and hygienic; there is a large field for sports and sports activities; and our cafeteria has a very vibrant atmosphere .

likes.text: The semester exams are so easy that every student has to pass them and study well.
Teachers and faculty members are well qualified and educated, Although everyone of them have different teaching style but still they try to deliver their best.

likes.text: I have chosen this course because I have been fascinated with computers and related technology since I was young.
In the college apart from studies we have fests too like sports fest and annual fest, also freshers and farewell for seniors.

college_info.college_name: Uttarakhand Ayurved University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

college_info.intro: Uttarakhand Ayurved University popular programmes are B.A.M.S and BHMS. UAU Dehradun students are placed in top companies at top positions. The BHMS students will learn fundamental principles of Homoeopathy and will also learn about Applied Anatomy. The basic aim of providing education and training in a Homoeopathic institution is to prepare a competent Homoeopathic Physician who is very much capable of functioning effectively and independently under the Rural and Urban setups. Overall, it's one of the top universities offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the Uttarakhand Ayurved University courses and their respective eligibility and Uttarakhand Ayurved University fee:

reviews_list.review_title: Study is far better than any other colleges in Haridwar district.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 80% of students got placed from our college after completion of their post-graduation. You can do your practice in Ayurveda, or you can open your own Ayurveda hospital, or you can become a professor in your field. After your PG, you can get an average package of 8 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure is good, with a small playground. The college is working hard to improve the campus as much as possible. Hostels are good. Rooms are well-furnished, with attached washrooms. Mess food is average. However, all mess food is average anywhere you go. Sports and events are less of a priority at this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I wouldn't recommend this college to anyone.

review_content.Placements: Quadra Institute of Medical Sciences offers very good studies and it is nice in academic activities. This college offers 6 months of internships on campus and 6 months off campus. Almost 100% of students are offered on-campus internships. The faculty is good .

review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is quite good. You get all the facilities like a gym, kettle, induction, free Wi-Fi, and a garden. Meals are prepared fresh daily, and the menu rotates frequently to keep things interesting. Overall, the combination of excellent academic facilities and a comfortable living environment makes for an enriching experience.

review_summary.college_name: Uttarakhand Ayurved University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery(BAMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college life in Dehradun - The faculty of Ayurveda.

content.Placements: Medical college does not provide any placement to anyone. When you complete the course, you can do a job in medical residence as a president medical officer. The salary depends on how much you put effort into your study and practice. If you have a good practice, they provide you with good money or you can open your clinic which depends on you.
content.Infrastructure: The course is good. You have to study both modern as well as Ayurveda simultaneously. You have to study all the subjects of medicine like in MBBS and also have to study Ayurveda in-depth. Hostels are not bad but they are not also great. Its annual charge is Rs.15,000. A tiffin service is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Almost 90%-95% of students are placed in the BSc nursing course. The average salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Max Hospital, Apollo Hospital, Fortis Hospital, Medanta Hospital, Synergy Hospital, and others. Top roles offered in the course include nursing staff, nursing superintendent, clinical educator, community health nurse, psychiatry nurse, critical care nurse, and overseas job offers.
content.Infrastructure: College has well-developed and well-furnished infrastructure and facilities are available. DIMS has fully furnished smart classrooms with all the advanced technology and well-equipped labs that help students with effective learning. A 24-hour Wi-Fi is available and the library has all books. Hostel rooms are fully furnished with double or triple seating arrangements, beds, almirahs, study tables, and chairs. Mess food is good in taste and hygiene in the mess is well-maintained. Many facilities are available in the hostel such as Wi-Fi, laundry, and a gym. Sports facilities are also available such as carrom, football, volleyball, badminton, and table tennis.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Study is far better than any other colleges in Haridwar district.

content.Placements: Approximately 80% of students got placed from our college after completion of their post-graduation. You can do your practice in Ayurveda, or you can open your own Ayurveda hospital, or you can become a professor in your field. After your PG, you can get an average package of 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure is good, with a small playground. The college is working hard to improve the campus as much as possible. Hostels are good. Rooms are well-furnished, with attached washrooms. Mess food is average. However, all mess food is average anywhere you go. Sports and events are less of a priority at this college.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is not so good. Campus is very small and compact. No grounds and sports. The hostel is also not good. Mess food is also very bad. description: Uttarakhand Ayurved University cutoff 2025 will be released soon for admission to various UG and PG courses. In the meantime, candidates who are seeking admission can check the sections below to view the Uttarakhand Ayurved University cutoff 2024 across different exams, courses, categories, and rounds. A few more updates are given below:

The Uttarakhand Ayurved University BAMS Cutoff 2024 is out for the sixth round. The cutoff for the BAMS based on category for General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD category candidates are given in the table below. Examining the Round 6 Cutoff list, the closing ranks for General AI quota candidates was 105381. The most sought-after course as per the cutoff list is Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery(BAMS).

Uttarakhand Ayurved University cutoff 2024 has been released for the fifth round, for the candidates seeking admission to the BAMS via AYUSH NEET. As per the AYUSH NEET UG Round 6 Seat Allotment Result, the most demanded course was Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery(BAMS) with a cutoff rank of 105381 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

Uttarakhand Ayurved University admission to the UG courses is based on valid AYUSH NEET UG scores, followed by a counselling round. A direct link will be provided below to download the counselling result for AYUSH NEET 2024 counselling.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty but bad college maintenance of environment and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are no lecture rooms available here. There is no Wi-Fi available on campus or in the hostel. The classrooms are small and dusty. The hostels are in very bad condition, and no facilities are provided here. The food is worse than anything else; something new is found in the food daily; recently, a bolt was found. Hostelers are not allowed to have their own vehicles. The rules are unappreciated and unacceptable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Doon Institute of Medical Sciences (DIMS)
reviews.review_heading: Dims Where Future Shines
reviews.review_text: Dims offers average infrastructure. The library has all the books required for your course and provides a good seating area. They also have many labs, such as the advanced nursing lab and anatomy labs, where each and every dummy is available.

reviews.review_heading: Really amazing faculty and amazing infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is great. There is a proper lab for each subject, and classrooms are well-furnished and maintained. However, there isn't much variety of food available in the canteen, and Wi-Fi is not provided. The hospital offers excellent medical facilities, and a sports meet is held every year with a proper playground. Hostels are not available yet.

reviews.review_heading: Worth it course and college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available in the college, including the canteen, library, sports and laboratory. There's no hostel right now but one hotel is currently being built. The food in the canteen is hygienic and tasty. There are various sports available, like cricket, football and basketball.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Shree Om UniversityReviewed on 1 Jul 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good, and teachers are also helpful, but it could be better.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. There are labs and libraries that also have books related to the subjects and equipment in the labs, but they need to be changed and repaired, and some chemicals have expired. There is also Wi-Fi and a computer lab, but not all of them work.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Dev Bhoomi Medical College of Ayurveda and HospitalReviewed on 17 Jan 2023)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our faculty members, but I am not satisfied with the management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is impressive. If you like a large area and natural places with mountain-view classrooms, this is the best college from the infrastructure point of view. Labs are fully functional. The hostel is not good. I would never suggest choosing a hostel from this college. Canteen is very basic. You will have very few options to have something good to eat. The food served in the hostel is not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Shivalik Institute of Ayurved and ResarchReviewed on 8 Dec 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Good at academics.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are average. Labs and classrooms are well furnished and labs are well-equipped with instruments. The facilities in our hostel vert quite nice. The food was amazing. All nexesa facilities were provided.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Doon Institute of Medical Sciences (DIMS)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and up to the mark. Mess food provided is properly made and delicious. Classrooms are well-equipped with proper ventilation and fans. Every block has proper facilities for drinking water and a library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Doon Institute of Medical Sciences (DIMS)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The college has smart classrooms. We have professional, competent and expert faculty to inculcate a questioning bent of mind and curiosity in the students. Our faculty members with rich academics as well as industrial experience act as facilitators for the student's future and members for their lives. The university has a modern infrastructure and technological support for teaching, learning and personality development of its students. The university provides well-furnished lecture halls giving ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Doon Institute of Medical Sciences (DIMS)
reviews.review_heading: Teachers are good and supportive, infrastructure is good and spacious and peaceful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of DIMS is good. Wi-Fi is available in hostels but isn't available in the college. Library is good and has various books for every subject. Every classroom has a projector for displaying slides. Separate cricket, football and volleyball court are available which is good. It has its own hospital with good OPDs.
