reviews_list.review_title: I recommend you this college because it has really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: People who scored good marks in NEET were given admissions. There are management quota students who can clear their fees through educational loans, and scholarships are provided for A category. Generally, in medicine, there would be no placements till PG, but many educational events occur where they give certificates which can be useful for them in the USMLE exam. Also, internships are provided for a 1-year duration after 4 years of their MBBS. Interns are paid with a good stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have projector classrooms that are very large, where 200 students can sit. Excellent faculty, spacious labs, and a fully equipped mess and canteen are available. Indoor and outdoor sports are available, and a helipad is present. A big ground is also present.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It has good placements, good faculty members, average infrastructure, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: As this is a private medical college, no stipend will be provided for your internship. A lot of clinical knowledge can be gained during the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is the drawback of the college, mainly the boys' hostel. Classrooms are spacious and good. Study halls and a library are even present in the hospital. Every year, sports events are conducted which include football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, and kabadi.
review_content.Faculty: The final year faculty members are too good when compared to other years. In order to complete your MBBS course, you have to pass all the 4-year final exams, a total of 19 subjects. Faculty helps a lot in this process. The pass percentage is almost 90%.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with the mess food.

review_content.Placements: It is a private college. I am from the batch of 2015, and it has a total of 200 students. The fee for government quota students is Rs. 60,000 per annum, while for private admission, it is 1.6 lacs per annum. You can access everything related to medicine and learn. About 99% of students completed their internships from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our campus is good with projectors, vast benches for students and interactive classes. There are also CCTV cameras all over the college, and there might be over 400 cameras. There is separate parking for bikes and cars, and our college also has a bus. Hostels are decent, and the food served is fine. There is a separate library and many reading rooms.

admission_process.title: Prathima Institute of Medical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Prathima Institute of Medical Sciences admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences.Prathima Institute of Medical Sciencesadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNEET, NEET PG, and Telangana NEET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,70,000 - 22,50,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 66 months.

reviews_list.review_title: If you want college for minimum fees and also do not want to go to college regularly.

review_content.Placements: 30% of students are placed in a company. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. IT park companies came to the college. 10% students do an internship in companies for free. Companies can't pay for an internship. We have to pay for college for an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is big, around 12-15 acres approximately. No network connection in the classroom, jamers are there in the classroom. Wi-Fi are present in the labs, and the library is well. Both girls' and boys' hostels are present in the college. Mess is very decent. Cafe is available outside the college. We can go during the lunch break. Sports and games tournaments happen in the college.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is best for me.

review_content.Placements: The students were 50 to 60 percent placed in the course. The highest package offered was 10 to 12 LPA, and the lowest package offered was 6 LPA, with an average package of 8 LPA. The companies, included TCS and Infosys. Many students had gotten internships. The percentage ratio was 40 to 50 percent.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities were good in all courses and departments. Labs were neat and clean. The Wi-Fi was also in good condition. The library was available in the course for students and staff. The hostels were not on campus, but we knew that good facilities were provided by the college.

review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good, with a big campus area. Computer labs and the central library are available. Both girls' and boys' hostels are available in the college. Mess, canteen, and cafes are available in the college. Decent food was available. Sports and games tournaments happen in the college.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Chameli Devi Group of Institutions as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Chameli Devi Group of Institutions is a renowned institution offering B.Pharma, B.E. / B.Tech, D.Pharma, MBA/PGDM, BCA, B.Sc, B.Com (Hons), B.Com, BBA, MCA. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Chameli Devi Group of Institutions boasts an impressive review rating of 3.81 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.84 for Campus Life, 3.64 for Placements, 3.77 for Faculty, and 4.05 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: IDGI Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college environment with decent fees.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed from this course. 12 LPA is the highest package, and the average package is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. LNT, Lodha, and Tata Group companies came to the college for the placement. 50 percent of students got internships. Mostly roles offered by companies are civil engineer officer.
content.Infrastructure: The campus of the college is good, with well-built buildings constructed, and a good atmosphere, all greenery is present. Wi-Fi labs and libraries are well-managed. Classrooms a are decent. Hostel facility available for the students. Boys' and girls' hostels are separate. Mess and canteen football decent. You can play sports and games in your free time.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college for both B.Tech and B Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Chameli Devi Institute is one of the most well-known colleges for placement. The average package is 5 to 8 LPA. Our college has a good reputation, which helps us in interviews. More than 20 to 30 companies come for recruitment. Internship programmes are there for building students’ knowledge about work.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Our college has a very big ground nearby, 5 acres. The hostel is very big. Nearly 4000 students live there. Hostel gives good quality of food and a wide variety of foods, Wi-Fi, mineral water and many more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. with Computer Application - Batch of 2028

content.Infrastructure: The college campus is big, around 12-15 acres approximately. No network connection in the classroom, jamers are there in the classroom. Wi-Fi are present in the labs, and the library is well. Both girls' and boys' hostels are present in the college. Mess is very decent. Cafe is available outside the college. We can go during the lunch break. Sports and games tournaments happen in the college.

admission_process.title: Chameli Devi Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Chameli Devi Group of Institutions admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Chameli Devi Group of Institutions considers scores in JEE Main, CMAT, and MPPET for admission to specific courses.Chameli Devi Group of Institutionsoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 2 years - 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 38,000 - 1,50,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 40,000 - 56,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: Chameli Devi Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Chameli Devi Group of Institutions JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Chameli Devi Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 219466 and 1467145 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 219466, B.Tech in Civil Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 1466734.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 219466.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the Chameli Devi Group of Institutions B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech in Civil Engineering, B.Tech in Information Technology and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (IoT and Cyber Security), with last-round closing ranks of 219466, 969308, and 1228592, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: Good college environment with decent fees.
reviews.review_text: The campus of the college is good, with well-built buildings constructed, and a good atmosphere, all greenery is present. Wi-Fi labs and libraries are well-managed. Classrooms a are decent. Hostel facility available for the students. Boys' and girls' hostels are separate. Mess and canteen football decent. You can play sports and games in your free time.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for both B.Tech and B Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Our college has a very big ground nearby, 5 acres. The hostel is very big. Nearly 4000 students live there. Hostel gives good quality of food and a wide variety of foods, Wi-Fi, mineral water and many more.

reviews.review_heading: If you want college for minimum fees and also do not want to go to college regularly.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is big, around 12-15 acres approximately. No network connection in the classroom, jamers are there in the classroom. Wi-Fi are present in the labs, and the library is well. Both girls' and boys' hostels are present in the college. Mess is very decent. Cafe is available outside the college. We can go during the lunch break. Sports and games tournaments happen in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is best for me.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good in all courses and departments. Labs were neat and clean. The Wi-Fi was also in good condition. The library was available in the course for students and staff. The hostels were not on campus, but we knew that good facilities were provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Campus, mess, and faculty members are good in college. Value for money, but decent in placement.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good, with a big campus area. Computer labs and the central library are available. Both girls' and boys' hostels are available in the college. Mess, canteen, and cafes are available in the college. Decent food was available. Sports and games tournaments happen in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, helpful teachers, and career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: College provides good infrastructure with well-equipped labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a central library with plenty of resources. Hostels are clean and maintained regularly, with 24X7 water and electricity. Mess food is average but hygienic, and the canteen offers good variety. Medical facilities are available on campus. There are sports grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, and indoor games, making students' life balanced and engaging.

reviews.review_heading: College environment is good. Faculty members are also very good. I like the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good, I like it. CDGI's infrastructure aligns well with modern educational standards, delivering strong academic, extracurricular, and research facilities. Whether you are focused on engineering, management, pharmacy, or law, the campus provides a comprehensive environment for holistic development.

reviews.review_heading: A very nice journey with friendly teachers and excellent guidance.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in college, such as Wi-Fi, labs, clean classrooms, and a library. Very good teachers and faculty provide excellent teaching quality and focus on every student, helping them in their studies, which helps students get good marks in exams.

reviews.review_heading: I think this is the best college for placement and study.
reviews.review_text: I don't know about the hostel, but the infrastructure and feedback are very good. All facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, etc., are good in this college.

reviews.review_heading: No placements at this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college was under construction. The new infrastructure at the college was average. Hostel facility of the college was excellent. Toilets were good. Medical facilities were also present in deen office, and you had canteen facilities on college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and lively campus, decent placements, but curriculum needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The department offers well-equipped labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a good library. Hostel facilities are decent, with average mess food and a better canteen. Medical support is available on campus, and sports facilities are good for various games and activities.

reviews.review_heading: My best time at CDGI, Chameli Devi Groups of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Many of the facilities are provided and overall infrastructure is also good. All students who live in the hostel have access to the Wi-Fi. Labs are also available. Library is also available for them all the time. Overall, the quality of the facility provided by the college is very good. The food is excellent. There is a canteen available. Students can purchase and eat anything of their choice like manchurian noodles, baked samosas, and many more things. There are medical rooms available for sick...

reviews.review_heading: This is my overall experience of the college in 3.5 years.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure is good. There are many facilities provided by the college, such as many classrooms, high-tech computer labs, and many more labs, according to the requirements of the branch to which the student has selected. The canteen is very big, and there is a mess providing food. Medical facilities are also there, and many events are sponsored by the college, such as Citronics.

reviews.review_heading: With this amount of money, it is the best college for poor students to grow.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. All labs are decent and classrooms are also good. The library is also good but they should add some more books. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is very good. The food is available for all students and medical supplies are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The overall college experience is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite nice and decent. The facilities for hostel students are a secure place to live, yummy and hygienic food to eat, and provide best medical services for the students. They organize cultural and sports events, especially for hostel students.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Chameli Devi Group of Institutions

likes.text: The top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, Byju's, Cognizant, Wipro, and many more top companies.
Placements offers in our college are good, and many companies came to this college and give better packages to the students.
